2	# Copyright (c) Butterfingrz，13524387014@163.com
3	#
4	# Adapted from https://github.com/Dao-AILab/flash-attention/blob/main/flash_attn/cute/flash_fwd_sm90.py
5	#
6	# SM90 (Hopper) forward pass for FFPA attention — only SplitD for head_dim=512.
7	#
8	# Design:
9	#   - Producer WG: warp-0 issues TMA for Q (one-shot per tile), K and V
10	#     (per n_block, K/V double-staged for TMA-WGMMA overlap).
11	#   - WG1: QK-GEMM (full-D in one WGMMA) → online softmax → PV-front (atom 0,
12	#     gO cols 0:256) + LSE.
13	#   - WG2: PV-back only (atom 1, gO cols 256:512). Cross-WG sP/sScale handoff
14	#     via NamedBarrierFwd.{PFull, PEmpty, ScaleReady}.
15	#   - Epilogue: dual-slot sO (sO[0]=WG1, sO[1]=WG2), each WG fires its own
16	#     TMA store_O concurrently. sV ↔ sO live in a cute.union (mainloop /
17	#     epilogue mutually exclusive lifetimes).
18	#
19	# Constraints:
20	#   - tile_m == 64 (single M-atom WGMMA)
21	#   - tile_n == 32 (so K can carry a true 2-stage pipeline at hdim=512)
22	#   - tile_hdimv % 256 == 0 (PV (1,2,1) split)
23	#   - kv_same must be False (requires an independent V buffer)
24	#   - No paged KV / learnable_sink / seqused / block_sparsity
25	
26	from typing import Callable, Optional, Type
27	from functools import partial
28	import math
29	
30	import cuda.bindings.driver as cuda
31	
32	import cutlass
33	import cutlass.cute as cute
34	from cutlass import Float32, Int32, Boolean, const_expr
35	from cutlass.cute.nvgpu import OperandMajorMode, cpasync, warpgroup
36	from cutlass.utils import LayoutEnum
37	import cutlass.utils.hopper_helpers as sm90_utils_basic
38	from cutlass import pipeline
39	from cutlass.pipeline import pipeline_init_arrive, pipeline_init_wait
40	from cutlass.base_dsl.arch import Arch
41	from cutlass.base_dsl import BaseDSL
42	
43	from quack import copy_utils
44	from quack import layout_utils
45	from quack import sm90_utils
46	
47	from .utils.cute_dsl_utils import assume_tensor_aligned
48	from . import utils
49	from .utils.mask import AttentionMask
50	from .utils.softmax import (
51	  Softmax,
52	  apply_score_mod_inner,
53	  store_scale_to_smem,
54	  load_scale_from_smem,
55	  rescale_O_with_external_scale,
56	)
57	from .utils.seqlen_info import SeqlenInfoQK
58	from .utils.block_info import BlockInfo
59	from .utils import pipeline as pipeline_custom
60	from .utils.pack_gqa import PackGQA, pack_gqa_layout, make_packgqa_tiled_tma_atom
61	from .utils.named_barrier import NamedBarrierFwd
62	from quack.cute_dsl_utils import ParamsBase
63	from .utils.tile_scheduler import (
64	  TileSchedulerArguments,
65	  SingleTileScheduler,
66	  SingleTileLPTScheduler,
67	  SingleTileVarlenScheduler,
68	)
69	from cutlass.cute import FastDivmodDivisor
70	
71	
72	class FFPAAttnFwdSm90SplitD:
73	  """SM90 forward kernel for head_dim=512 (kv_same must be False for now).
74	
75	    3-role pipeline:
76	      - Producer WG: independent TMA loader (warp-0 elect_one).
77	      - WG1: QK + softmax + PV-front + LSE + epilogue (gO cols 0:hdimv/2).
78	      - WG2: PV-back + epilogue (gO cols hdimv/2:hdimv).
79	
80	    Full-D Q/K WGMMA (no D-chunk loop), tile_n=32 with 2-stage K and 2-stage V
81	    pipelines. sV ↔ sO share storage via cute.union (mainloop / epilogue
82	    mutually exclusive). Cross-WG sP/sScale handoff via named barriers.
83	    """
84	
85	  def __init__(
86	    self,
87	    dtype: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
88	    head_dim: int,
89	    head_dim_v: Optional[int] = None,
90	    qhead_per_kvhead: int = 1,
91	    is_causal: bool = False,
92	    is_local: bool = False,
93	    pack_gqa: bool = True,
94	    tile_m: int = 64,
95	    tile_n: int = 128,
96	    score_mod: Optional[cutlass.Constexpr] = None,
97	    mask_mod: Optional[cutlass.Constexpr] = None,
98	    has_aux_tensors: bool = False,
99	    kv_same: bool = False,
100	  ):
101	    self.dtype = dtype
102	    hdim_multiple_of = 16
103	    self.tile_hdim = int(
104	      math.ceil(head_dim / hdim_multiple_of) * hdim_multiple_of
105	    )
106	    head_dim_v = head_dim_v if head_dim_v is not None else head_dim
107	    self.tile_hdimv = int(
108	      math.ceil(head_dim_v / hdim_multiple_of) * hdim_multiple_of
109	    )
110	    self.check_hdim_oob = head_dim != self.tile_hdim
111	    self.check_hdim_v_oob = head_dim_v != self.tile_hdimv
112	    self.qhead_per_kvhead = qhead_per_kvhead
113	    self.is_causal = is_causal
114	    self.is_local = is_local
115	    self.pack_gqa = pack_gqa
116	    self.tile_m = tile_m
117	    self.tile_n = tile_n
118	    self.score_mod = score_mod
119	    self.mask_mod = mask_mod
120	    self.qk_acc_dtype = Float32
121	    self.vec_size: cutlass.Constexpr = getattr(
122	      score_mod, "__vec_size__", 1 if cutlass.const_expr(has_aux_tensors) else 2
123	    )
124	    self.arch = BaseDSL._get_dsl().get_arch_enum()
125	
126	    # ── kv_same not support for yet  ──
127	    self.kv_same = kv_same
128	    assert not kv_same, (
129	      "_fwd_d512_sm90 only supports kv_same=False. "
130	      "Use the V1 kv_same=True forward path if you need that variant."
131	    )
132	
133	    # ── SM90 SplitD specific ──
134	    # SS-mode PV (sP in SMEM): required for cross-WG handoff
135	    self.mma_pv_is_rs = False
136	    # 128 matches TMA cache-line and satisfies all swizzle constraints
137	    # 8 buffers near the 228KB ceiling).
138	    self.buffer_align_bytes = 128
139	    self.use_tma_KV = True
140	    self.cluster_shape_mn = (1, 1)
141	    assert self.arch >= Arch.sm_90 and self.arch <= Arch.sm_90a, "Only SM 9.x is supported"
142	    assert not self.pack_gqa or self.tile_m % self.qhead_per_kvhead == 0, (
143	      f"SplitD requires tile_m ({self.tile_m}) divisible by qhead_per_kvhead "
144	      f"({self.qhead_per_kvhead}) when pack_gqa=True. "
145	      f"Use pack_gqa=False for this head configuration."
146	    )
147	
148	    # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
149	    # 3-role pipeline — 1 TMA producer WG + 2 MMA WGs
150	    # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
151	    self.tile_n = 32
152	    self.tile_hdimv_half = self.tile_hdimv // 2  # 256
153	    self.tile_hdim_full = self.tile_hdim  # 512
154	
155	    self.num_stages_q = 1
156	    self.num_stages_k = 2  # double-stage K
157	    self.num_stages_v = 2  # multi-stage V (PV pipeline)
158	    # sScale double-stage: required when stages_k>=2 because WG1 iter
159	    # k+2 store_scales(s_{k+1}) may overlap WG2 iter k+1 load_scales(s_k);
160	    # double buffer lets them physically separate
161	    self.num_stages_p = 2
162	    # Defense: sScale must be at least as deeply staged as K to avoid
163	    # the race described above.
164	    assert self.num_stages_p >= self.num_stages_k, (
165	      f"num_stages_p ({self.num_stages_p}) must be >= num_stages_k "
166	      f"({self.num_stages_k}) to prevent sScale write/read race"
167	    )
168	    self.num_stages_sP_buf = 3
169	    self.num_producer_regs = 24  # producer WG (FA3 baseline)
170	    self.num_mma_regs_wg1 = 240  # 4×32×240 = 30720
171	    self.num_mma_regs_wg2 = 240  # 4×32×240 = 30720
172	    assert self.tile_m == 64, "SplitD requires tile_m == 64"
173	    assert self.tile_hdimv % 256 == 0, "PV (1,2,1) requires tile_hdimv % 256 == 0"
174	
175	  def _get_tiled_mma(self):
176	    # QK-GEMM: S[tile_m, tile_n] = Q[tile_m, full_D] @ K[full_D, tile_n]
177	    tiled_mma_qk = sm90_utils_basic.make_trivial_tiled_mma(
178	      self.dtype,
179	      self.dtype,
180	      OperandMajorMode.K,
181	      OperandMajorMode.K,
182	      Float32,
183	      atom_layout_mnk=(self.tile_m // 64, 1, 1),
184	      tiler_mn=(64, self.tile_n),
185	    )
186	    # 2-WG asymmetric PV along N
187	    tiled_mma_pv = sm90_utils_basic.make_trivial_tiled_mma(
188	      self.dtype,
189	      self.dtype,
190	      OperandMajorMode.K,
191	      OperandMajorMode.MN,
192	      Float32,
193	      atom_layout_mnk=(1, 2, 1),
194	      tiler_mn=(64, self.tile_hdimv_half),
195	      a_source=warpgroup.OperandSource.SMEM,
196	    )
197	    assert tiled_mma_pv.size == 256, "PV TiledMma must lower to 256 threads"
198	    # RS-mode tiled_mma for WG1's PV-front only.
199	    tiled_mma_pv_wg1 = sm90_utils_basic.make_trivial_tiled_mma(
200	      self.dtype,
201	      self.dtype,
202	      OperandMajorMode.K,
203	      OperandMajorMode.MN,
204	      Float32,
205	      atom_layout_mnk=(1, 2, 1),
206	      tiler_mn=(64, self.tile_hdimv_half),
207	      a_source=warpgroup.OperandSource.RMEM,
208	    )
209	    assert tiled_mma_pv_wg1.size == 256, "WG1 RS-mode tiled_mma_pv shape must match SS-mode"
210	    # Epilogue mini tiled MMA: per-WG single-atom (64, hdimv_half) shape.
211	    tiled_mma_pv_epi = sm90_utils_basic.make_trivial_tiled_mma(
212	      self.dtype,
213	      self.dtype,
214	      OperandMajorMode.K,
215	      OperandMajorMode.MN,
216	      Float32,
217	      atom_layout_mnk=(1, 1, 1),
218	      tiler_mn=(64, self.tile_hdimv_half),
219	      a_source=warpgroup.OperandSource.SMEM,
220	    )
221	    assert tiled_mma_pv_epi.size == 128
222	    return tiled_mma_qk, tiled_mma_pv, tiled_mma_pv_wg1, tiled_mma_pv_epi
223	
224	  def _get_shared_storage_cls(self):
225	    """(2-WG async PV) shared storage: sQ/sK + sV/sO union + sP/sScale.
226	
227	        sV (mainloop) and sO (epilogue) have mutually-exclusive lifetimes —
228	        sV is released before epilogue starts; sO is only written during
229	        epilogue. Use cute.union so they share the same physical SMEM
230	        """
231	    sQ_struct, sK_struct, sV_struct, sP_struct, sO_struct = [
232	      cute.struct.Align[
233	        cute.struct.MemRange[self.dtype, cute.cosize(layout)],
234	        self.buffer_align_bytes,
235	      ] for layout in (
236	        self.sQ_layout,
237	        self.sK_layout,
238	        self.sV_layout,
239	        self.sP_layout,
240	        self.sO_layout,
241	      )
242	    ]
243	    # sScale: per-row fp32 (tile_m × num_stages_p)
244	    sScale_struct = cute.struct.Align[
245	      cute.struct.MemRange[Float32, cute.cosize(self.sScale_layout)],
246	      self.buffer_align_bytes,
247	    ]
248	    mbar_ptr_Q_struct = cute.struct.MemRange[cutlass.Int64,
249	                                             self.num_stages_q * 2]
250	    mbar_ptr_K_struct = cute.struct.MemRange[cutlass.Int64,
251	                                             self.num_stages_k * 2]
252	    mbar_ptr_V_struct = cute.struct.MemRange[cutlass.Int64,
253	                                             self.num_stages_v * 2]
254	
255	    # pipeline_P mbarrier backing (2 stages × 2 phases = 4 Int64 = 32 B).
256	    mbar_ptr_P_struct = cute.struct.MemRange[cutlass.Int64,
257	                                             self.num_stages_sP_buf * 2]
258	
259	    # pipeline_Scale mbarrier backing (num_stages_p stages × 2 = 4 Int64).
260	    mbar_ptr_Scale_struct = cute.struct.MemRange[cutlass.Int64,
261	                                                 self.num_stages_p * 2]
262	
263	    @cute.union
264	    class SmemVO_t:
265	      sV: sV_struct  # mainloop: PV-front + PV-back B operand
266	      sO: sO_struct  # epilogue: per-WG half-width staging (sO[wg_idx])
267	
268	    @cute.struct
269	    class SharedStorage:
270	      mbar_ptr_Q: mbar_ptr_Q_struct
271	      mbar_ptr_K: mbar_ptr_K_struct
272	      mbar_ptr_V: mbar_ptr_V_struct
273	      mbar_ptr_P: mbar_ptr_P_struct  # pipeline_P mbarrier storage
274	      mbar_ptr_Scale: mbar_ptr_Scale_struct  # pipeline_Scale mbarrier storage
275	      sQ: sQ_struct
276	      sK: sK_struct
277	      sVO: SmemVO_t  # union: sV (mainloop) | sO (epilogue)
278	      sP: sP_struct  # softmax-out → PV A operand (2-stage, 5.5b)
279	      sScale: sScale_struct  # row_scale handoff WG1→WG2
280	
281	    return SharedStorage
282	
283	  @cute.jit
284	  def __call__(
285	    self,
286	    mQ: cute.Tensor,
287	    mK: cute.Tensor,
288	    mV: cute.Tensor,
289	    mO: cute.Tensor,
290	    mLSE: Optional[cute.Tensor],
291	    softmax_scale: Float32,
292	    mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
293	    mCuSeqlensK: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
294	    window_size_left: Int32 | int | None = None,
295	    window_size_right: Int32 | int | None = None,
296	    aux_tensors: Optional[list] = None,
297	    stream: cuda.CUstream = None,
298	  ):
299	    # Type check (inlined, SplitD has no mSeqUsedQ/K)
300	    if const_expr(
301	      not (
302	        mQ.element_type == mK.element_type == mV.element_type == mO.element_type
303	      )
304	    ):
305	      raise TypeError("All tensors must have the same data type")
306	    if const_expr(mQ.element_type not in [cutlass.Float16, cutlass.BFloat16]):
307	      raise TypeError("Only Float16 or BFloat16 is supported")
308	    if const_expr(mLSE is not None and mLSE.element_type != Float32):
309	      raise TypeError("LSE tensor must be Float32")
310	    if const_expr(
311	      mCuSeqlensQ is not None and mCuSeqlensQ.element_type != Int32
312	    ):
313	      raise TypeError("cu_seqlens_q tensor must be Int32")
314	    if const_expr(
315	      mCuSeqlensK is not None and mCuSeqlensK.element_type != Int32
316	    ):
317	      raise TypeError("cu_seqlens_k tensor must be Int32")
318	    assert mQ.element_type == self.dtype
319	    self.varlen_q = mCuSeqlensQ is not None
320	
321	    mQ, mK, mV, mO = [assume_tensor_aligned(t) for t in (mQ, mK, mV, mO)]
322	    QO_layout_transpose = [1, 3, 2, 0] if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is None
323	                                                     ) else [0, 2, 1]
324	    mQ, mO = [layout_utils.select(t, QO_layout_transpose) for t in (mQ, mO)]
325	    KV_layout_transpose = [1, 3, 2, 0] if const_expr(mCuSeqlensK is None
326	                                                     ) else [0, 2, 1]
327	    mK, mV = [layout_utils.select(t, KV_layout_transpose) for t in (mK, mV)]
328	    LSE_layout_transpose = [2, 1, 0] if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is None
329	                                                   ) else [1, 0]
330	    mLSE = layout_utils.select(mLSE, LSE_layout_transpose) if const_expr(
331	      mLSE is not None
332	    ) else None
333	
334	    tiled_mma_qk, tiled_mma_pv, tiled_mma_pv_wg1, tiled_mma_pv_epi = self._get_tiled_mma(
335	    )
336	    self.num_threads_per_warp_group = 128
337	
338	    # 1 producer WG + 2 MMA WGs. Total = 384 threads.
339	    self.num_mma_threads = tiled_mma_pv.size  # 256 (WG1+WG2)
340	    self.num_wg_mma = self.num_mma_threads // self.num_threads_per_warp_group  # 2
341	    assert self.num_wg_mma == 2, "SplitD requires num_wg_mma == 2"
342	
343	    # Producer WG occupies warp_group_idx==0 (full WG of 128, only warp-0 issues TMAs).
344	    self.num_producer_threads = self.num_threads_per_warp_group  # 128
345	    self.num_threads = self.num_threads_per_warp_group * (
346	      self.num_wg_mma + 1
347	    )  # 384
348	    self.num_Q_load_threads = self.num_threads_per_warp_group
349	
350	    # Each WG epilogues its own half-width sO slot independently.
351	    self.num_epilogue_threads = self.num_threads_per_warp_group
352	    self.num_mma_regs = self.num_mma_regs_wg1  # display-only; real values are set per WG
353	
354	    self.use_tma_Q = self.arch >= Arch.sm_90 and not (
355	      self.pack_gqa and self.tile_m % self.qhead_per_kvhead != 0
356	    )
357	    self.use_tma_O = self.use_tma_Q
358	
359	    # ═══ SMEM layouts (full-D Q/K, multi-stage K/V pipeline) ═══
360	    # sQ: full-D (64×512), single stage. QK becomes one full-D WGMMA.
361	    self.sQ_layout = sm90_utils.make_smem_layout(
362	      mQ.element_type,
363	      LayoutEnum.ROW_MAJOR,
364	      (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdim_full),
365	      stage=self.num_stages_q,
366	    )
367	    # sK: full-D (tile_n=32 × 512), num_stages_k=2 stages — true K-stage pipeline
368	    self.sK_layout = sm90_utils.make_smem_layout(
369	      mK.element_type,
370	      LayoutEnum.ROW_MAJOR,
371	      (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdim_full),
372	      stage=self.num_stages_k,
373	    )
374	    # sV: (tile_n=32, tile_hdimv=512), num_stages_v=2 stages
375	    # PV B operand wants MN-major (N=tile_hdimv contiguous) → use ROW_MAJOR.
376	    self.sV_layout = sm90_utils.make_smem_layout(
377	      mV.element_type,
378	      LayoutEnum.ROW_MAJOR,
379	      (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdimv),
380	      stage=self.num_stages_v,
381	    )
382	    # sP: K-major (A operand), (tile_m=64, tile_n=32) × stage=num_stages_sP_buf
383	    # WG1 writes sP[k%N] while WG2 reads
384	    # sP[(k-1)%N]; sP[(k-2)%N] is empty (released last iter).
385	    # Decouples STSM(sP) from LDS(sP) to hide long_scoreboard.
386	    self.sP_layout = sm90_utils.make_smem_layout(
387	      self.dtype,
388	      LayoutEnum.ROW_MAJOR,
389	      (self.tile_m, self.tile_n),
390	      stage=self.num_stages_sP_buf,
391	    )
392	    # sScale: fp32, (tile_m, kStages=2). Double-buffered for store_scales(prev)
393	    # vs load_scales(current) staggering (online softmax across K-stages).
394	    self.sScale_layout = cute.make_layout(
395	      (self.tile_m, self.num_stages_p),
396	      stride=(self.num_stages_p + 1, 1),
397	    )
398	    # sO: half-width double-staged (64 KB total) — one slot per MMA WG.
399	    self.sO_layout = sm90_utils.make_smem_layout(
400	      mO.element_type,
401	      LayoutEnum.ROW_MAJOR,
402	      (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv_half),
403	      stage=2,
404	    )
405	
406	    SharedStorage = self._get_shared_storage_cls()
407	
408	    mQ_og, mO_og = mQ, mO
409	    if const_expr(self.pack_gqa):
410	      nheads_kv = mK.shape[2]
411	      mQ = pack_gqa_layout(mQ, self.qhead_per_kvhead, nheads_kv, head_idx=2)
412	      mO = pack_gqa_layout(mO, self.qhead_per_kvhead, nheads_kv, head_idx=2)
413	      if const_expr(mLSE is not None):
414	        mLSE = pack_gqa_layout(
415	          mLSE, self.qhead_per_kvhead, nheads_kv, head_idx=1
416	        )
417	
418	    gmem_tiled_copy_Q = cpasync.CopyBulkTensorTileG2SOp()
419	    gmem_tiled_copy_KV = cpasync.CopyBulkTensorTileG2SOp()
420	    gmem_tiled_copy_O = cpasync.CopyBulkTensorTileS2GOp()
421	
422	    # full-D Q/K + full-hdimv V per K-stage
423	    self.tma_copy_bytes = {
424	      "Q_full":
425	      cute.size_in_bytes(
426	        mQ.element_type, cute.select(self.sQ_layout, mode=[0, 1])
427	      ),
428	      "K_full":
429	      cute.size_in_bytes(
430	        mK.element_type, cute.select(self.sK_layout, mode=[0, 1])
431	      ),
432	      "V_full":
433	      cute.size_in_bytes(
434	        mV.element_type, cute.select(self.sV_layout, mode=[0, 1])
435	      ),
436	    }
437	
438	    make_tiled_tma_atom_fn = (
439	      partial(
440	        make_packgqa_tiled_tma_atom,
441	        qhead_per_kvhead=self.qhead_per_kvhead,
442	        head_idx=2
443	      ) if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else cpasync.make_tiled_tma_atom
444	    )
445	
446	    # loads Q/K full-D in one TMA per work-tile / K-stage
447	    qk_box_d = self.tile_hdim_full
448	    tma_atom_Q, tma_tensor_Q = None, None
449	    if const_expr(self.use_tma_Q):
450	      tma_atom_Q, tma_tensor_Q = make_tiled_tma_atom_fn(
451	        gmem_tiled_copy_Q,
452	        mQ_og if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else mQ,
453	        cute.select(self.sQ_layout, mode=[0, 1]),
454	        (self.tile_m, qk_box_d),
455	      )
456	    tma_atom_K, tma_tensor_K = cpasync.make_tiled_tma_atom(
457	      gmem_tiled_copy_KV,
458	      mK,
459	      cute.select(self.sK_layout, mode=[0, 1]),
460	      (self.tile_n, qk_box_d),
461	      1,
462	    )
463	    # V TMA atom: loads full hdimv into sV.
464	    tma_atom_V, tma_tensor_V = cpasync.make_tiled_tma_atom(
465	      gmem_tiled_copy_KV,
466	      mV,
467	      cute.select(self.sV_layout, mode=[0, 1]),  # full hdimv, MN-major
468	      (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdimv),
469	      1,
470	    )
471	    tma_atom_O, tma_tensor_O = None, None
472	    if const_expr(self.use_tma_O):
473	      mO_tma = mO_og if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else mO
474	      if const_expr(self.varlen_q):
475	        mO_tma = copy_utils.create_ragged_tensor_for_tma(
476	          mO_tma, ragged_dim=0, ptr_shift=True
477	        )
478	      # each WG stores its own half-width tile (tile_m, tile_hdimv_half)
479	      tma_atom_O, tma_tensor_O = make_tiled_tma_atom_fn(
480	        gmem_tiled_copy_O,
481	        mO_tma,
482	        cute.select(self.sO_layout, mode=[0, 1]),
483	        (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv_half),
484	      )
485	
486	    if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is not None):
487	      TileScheduler = SingleTileVarlenScheduler
488	    else:
489	      TileScheduler = (
490	        SingleTileScheduler if const_expr(not self.is_causal or self.is_local)
491	        else SingleTileLPTScheduler
492	      )
493	    tile_sched_args = TileSchedulerArguments(
494	      cute.ceil_div(cute.size(mQ.shape[0]), self.tile_m),
495	      cute.size(mQ.shape[2]),
496	      cute.size(mQ.shape[3]) if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is None) else
497	      cute.size(mCuSeqlensQ.shape[0] - 1),
498	      1,
499	      cute.size(mK.shape[0]),
500	      mQ.shape[1],
501	      mV.shape[1],
502	      total_q=cute.size(mQ.shape[0]) if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is not None) else
503	      cute.size(mQ.shape[0]) * cute.size(mQ.shape[3]),
504	      tile_shape_mn=(self.tile_m, self.tile_n),
505	      mCuSeqlensQ=mCuSeqlensQ,
506	      qhead_per_kvhead_packgqa=self.qhead_per_kvhead
507	      if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
508	      element_size=self.dtype.width // 8,
509	      lpt=self.is_causal or self.is_local,
510	    )
511	    tile_sched_params = TileScheduler.to_underlying_arguments(tile_sched_args)
512	    grid_dim = TileScheduler.get_grid_shape(tile_sched_params)
513	    softmax_scale_log2, softmax_scale = utils.compute_softmax_scale_log2(
514	      softmax_scale, self.score_mod
515	    )
516	    window_size_left = Int32(
517	      window_size_left
518	    ) if window_size_left is not None else None
519	    window_size_right = Int32(
520	      window_size_right
521	    ) if window_size_right is not None else None
522	    fastdiv_mods = utils.compute_fastdiv_mods(
523	      mQ, mK, self.qhead_per_kvhead, self.pack_gqa, aux_tensors, None
524	    )
525	
526	    self.kernel(
527	      tma_tensor_Q if const_expr(self.use_tma_Q) else mQ,
528	      tma_tensor_K,
529	      tma_tensor_V,
530	      tma_tensor_O if const_expr(self.use_tma_O) else mO,
531	      mLSE,
532	      mCuSeqlensQ,
533	      mCuSeqlensK,
534	      tma_atom_Q,
535	      tma_atom_K,
536	      tma_atom_V,
537	      tma_atom_O,
538	      softmax_scale_log2,
539	      softmax_scale,
540	      window_size_left,
541	      window_size_right,
542	      self.sQ_layout,
543	      self.sK_layout,
544	      self.sV_layout,
545	      self.sP_layout,
546	      self.sScale_layout,
547	      self.sO_layout,
548	      tiled_mma_qk,
549	      tiled_mma_pv,
550	      tiled_mma_pv_wg1,  # RS-mode tiled_mma for WG1 PV-front
551	      tiled_mma_pv_epi,
552	      tile_sched_params,
553	      TileScheduler,
554	      SharedStorage,
555	      aux_tensors,
556	      fastdiv_mods,
557	    ).launch(
558	      grid=grid_dim,
559	      block=[self.num_threads, 1, 1],
560	      stream=stream,
561	      min_blocks_per_mp=1,
562	    )

564	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
565	  # 2-WG asymmetric PV + folded TMA producer
566	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
567	  @cute.kernel
568	  def kernel(
569	    self,
570	    mQ: cute.Tensor,
571	    mK: cute.Tensor,
572	    mV: cute.Tensor,
573	    mO: cute.Tensor,
574	    mLSE: Optional[cute.Tensor],
575	    mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor],
576	    mCuSeqlensK: Optional[cute.Tensor],
577	    tma_atom_Q: Optional[cute.CopyAtom],
578	    tma_atom_K: cute.CopyAtom,
579	    tma_atom_V: cute.CopyAtom,
580	    tma_atom_O: Optional[cute.CopyAtom],
581	    softmax_scale_log2: Float32,
582	    softmax_scale: Optional[Float32],
583	    window_size_left: Optional[Int32],
584	    window_size_right: Optional[Int32],
585	    sQ_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
586	    sK_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
587	    sV_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
588	    sP_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
589	    sScale_layout: cute.Layout,
590	    sO_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
591	    tiled_mma_qk: cute.TiledMma,
592	    tiled_mma_pv: cute.TiledMma,
593	    tiled_mma_pv_wg1: cute.TiledMma,  # RS-mode for WG1 PV-front
594	    tiled_mma_pv_epi: cute.TiledMma,
595	    tile_sched_params: ParamsBase,
596	    TileScheduler: cutlass.Constexpr[Callable],
597	    SharedStorage: cutlass.Constexpr[Callable],
598	    aux_tensors=Optional[list[cute.Tensor]],
599	    fastdiv_mods=None,
600	  ):
601	    warp_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx())
602	    if warp_idx == 0:
603	      for tma_atom in (tma_atom_Q, tma_atom_K, tma_atom_V, tma_atom_O):
604	        if const_expr(tma_atom is not None):
605	          cpasync.prefetch_descriptor(tma_atom)
606	
607	    smem = cutlass.utils.SmemAllocator()
608	    storage = smem.allocate(SharedStorage)
609	
610	    ThreadCooperativeGroup = partial(
611	      pipeline.CooperativeGroup, pipeline.Agent.Thread
612	    )
613	    # Producer: independent producer WG, warp-0 via elect_one → 1 thread per TMA
614	    tma_producer_group = ThreadCooperativeGroup(1)
615	
616	    # Q/K consumer: only WG1 (4 warps = 128 threads).
617	    # cg.size = #warps because each warp does 1 elect_one release per cycle.
618	    qk_consumer_group = ThreadCooperativeGroup(
619	      self.num_threads_per_warp_group // cute.arch.WARP_SIZE
620	    )
621	
622	    # V consumer: WG1 + WG2 = 2 MMA warpgroups = 8 warps. CRITICAL: use
623	    # CRITICAL: use num_mma_threads (256, MMA-only), NOT num_threads
624	    v_consumer_group = ThreadCooperativeGroup(
625	      self.num_mma_threads // cute.arch.WARP_SIZE
626	    )
627	
628	    pipeline_q = pipeline_custom.PipelineTmaAsync.create(
629	      barrier_storage=storage.mbar_ptr_Q.data_ptr(),
630	      num_stages=self.num_stages_q,
631	      producer_group=tma_producer_group,
632	      consumer_group=qk_consumer_group,
633	      tx_count=self.tma_copy_bytes["Q_full"],
634	      defer_sync=True,
635	    )
636	    pipeline_k = pipeline_custom.PipelineTmaAsync.create(
637	      barrier_storage=storage.mbar_ptr_K.data_ptr(),
638	      num_stages=self.num_stages_k,
639	      producer_group=tma_producer_group,
640	      consumer_group=qk_consumer_group,
641	      tx_count=self.tma_copy_bytes["K_full"],
642	      defer_sync=True,
643	    )
644	    pipeline_v = pipeline_custom.PipelineTmaAsync.create(
645	      barrier_storage=storage.mbar_ptr_V.data_ptr(),
646	      num_stages=self.num_stages_v,
647	      producer_group=tma_producer_group,
648	      consumer_group=v_consumer_group,
649	      tx_count=self.tma_copy_bytes["V_full"],
650	      defer_sync=True,
651	    )
652	
653	    # cross-WG sP handshake via mbarrier (replaces PFull/PEmpty named
654	    # barrier). Producer = WG1 (128 threads, writes sP[k]); consumer = WG2
655	    # (128 threads, reads sP[k-1]).
656	    sP_producer_group = ThreadCooperativeGroup(
657	      self.num_threads_per_warp_group // cute.arch.WARP_SIZE
658	    )
659	    sP_consumer_group = ThreadCooperativeGroup(
660	      self.num_threads_per_warp_group // cute.arch.WARP_SIZE
661	    )
662	    pipeline_P = pipeline_custom.PipelineAsync.create(
663	      barrier_storage=storage.mbar_ptr_P.data_ptr(),
664	      num_stages=self.num_stages_sP_buf,
665	      producer_group=sP_producer_group,
666	      consumer_group=sP_consumer_group,
667	      # WG1 already issues fence_view_async_shared + sync_warp before
668	      # commit; PipelineAsync.create's own syncwarp would be redundant.
669	      elect_one_commit=True,
670	      syncwarp_before_commit=False,
671	      elect_one_release=True,
672	      syncwarp_before_release=False,
673	    )
674	
675	    # pipeline_Scale replaces NamedBarrierFwd.ScaleReady in mainloop.
676	    # Same template as pipeline_P (WG1 producer, WG2 consumer, both 128
677	    # threads = 4 warps). num_stages = num_stages_p (2) matches sScale layout.
678	    sScale_producer_group = ThreadCooperativeGroup(
679	      self.num_threads_per_warp_group // cute.arch.WARP_SIZE
680	    )
681	    sScale_consumer_group = ThreadCooperativeGroup(
682	      self.num_threads_per_warp_group // cute.arch.WARP_SIZE
683	    )
684	    pipeline_Scale = pipeline_custom.PipelineAsync.create(
685	      barrier_storage=storage.mbar_ptr_Scale.data_ptr(),
686	      num_stages=self.num_stages_p,
687	      producer_group=sScale_producer_group,
688	      consumer_group=sScale_consumer_group,
689	      elect_one_commit=True,
690	      syncwarp_before_commit=False,
691	      elect_one_release=True,
692	      syncwarp_before_release=False,
693	    )
694	
695	    pipeline_init_arrive(
696	      cluster_shape_mn=self.cluster_shape_mn, is_relaxed=True
697	    )
698	
699	    # ═══ SMEM tensors ═══
700	    sQ = storage.sQ.get_tensor(sQ_layout.outer, swizzle=sQ_layout.inner)
701	    sK = storage.sK.get_tensor(sK_layout.outer, swizzle=sK_layout.inner)
702	
703	    # sV and sO share storage.sVO (cute.union)
704	    sV = storage.sVO.sV.get_tensor(sV_layout.outer, swizzle=sV_layout.inner)
705	    # sVt is the transpose-view of sV with shape
706	    sVt = layout_utils.transpose_view(sV)
707	    sP = storage.sP.get_tensor(sP_layout.outer, swizzle=sP_layout.inner)
708	    sScale = storage.sScale.get_tensor(sScale_layout, dtype=Float32)
709	    sO = storage.sVO.sO.get_tensor(
710	      sO_layout.outer, swizzle=sO_layout.inner, dtype=self.dtype
711	    )
712	
713	    block_info = BlockInfo(
714	      self.tile_m,
715	      self.tile_n,
716	      self.is_causal,
717	      self.is_local,
718	      window_size_left,
719	      window_size_right,
720	      qhead_per_kvhead_packgqa=self.qhead_per_kvhead
721	      if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
722	    )
723	    SeqlenInfoCls = partial(
724	      SeqlenInfoQK.create,
725	      seqlen_q_static=mQ.shape[0]
726	      if const_expr(not self.pack_gqa) else mQ.shape[0][1],
727	      seqlen_k_static=mK.shape[0],
728	      mCuSeqlensQ=mCuSeqlensQ,
729	      mCuSeqlensK=mCuSeqlensK,
730	    )
731	    AttentionMaskCls = partial(
732	      AttentionMask,
733	      self.tile_m,
734	      self.tile_n,
735	      window_size_left=window_size_left,
736	      window_size_right=window_size_right,
737	      qhead_per_kvhead_packgqa=self.qhead_per_kvhead
738	      if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
739	    )
740	    TileSchedulerCls = partial(TileScheduler.create, tile_sched_params)
741	
742	    pipeline_init_wait(cluster_shape_mn=self.cluster_shape_mn)
743	
744	    tidx, _, _ = cute.arch.thread_idx()
745	    warp_group_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(
746	      tidx // self.num_threads_per_warp_group
747	    )
748	
749	    if warp_group_idx == 0:
750	      # Producer WG: drops register count so MMA WGs can take more.
751	      cute.arch.setmaxregister_decrease(self.num_producer_regs)
752	      self.producer(
753	        mQ,
754	        mK,
755	        mV,
756	        sQ,
757	        sK,
758	        sV,
759	        tma_atom_Q,
760	        tma_atom_K,
761	        tma_atom_V,
762	        pipeline_q,
763	        pipeline_k,
764	        pipeline_v,
765	        block_info,
766	        SeqlenInfoCls,
767	        TileSchedulerCls,
768	      )
769	    elif warp_group_idx == 1:
770	      # WG1 (QK + softmax + PV-front): tidx ∈ [128, 256), pass tidx_in_wg ∈ [0, 128)
771	      cute.arch.setmaxregister_increase(self.num_mma_regs_wg1)
772	      tidx_in_wg = tidx - self.num_threads_per_warp_group
773	      self.mma_wg1(
774	        tiled_mma_qk,
775	        tiled_mma_pv,
776	        tiled_mma_pv_wg1,  # RS-mode tiled_mma for WG1 PV-front
777	        tiled_mma_pv_epi,
778	        mO,
779	        mLSE,
780	        sQ,
781	        sK,
782	        sVt,  # transpose-view for PV partition_B
783	        sP,
784	        sScale,
785	        sO,
786	        pipeline_q,
787	        pipeline_k,
788	        pipeline_v,
789	        pipeline_P,  # sP cross-WG mbarrier
790	        pipeline_Scale,  # sScale cross-WG mbarrier
791	        tma_atom_O,
792	        tidx_in_wg,
793	        softmax_scale_log2,
794	        softmax_scale,
795	        block_info,
796	        SeqlenInfoCls,
797	        AttentionMaskCls,
798	        TileSchedulerCls,
799	        aux_tensors,
800	        fastdiv_mods,
801	      )
802	    else:
803	      # WG2 (PV-back only — no producer role). tidx ∈ [256, 384).
804	      cute.arch.setmaxregister_increase(self.num_mma_regs_wg2)
805	      tidx_in_wg = tidx - 2 * self.num_threads_per_warp_group
806	      self.mma_wg2(
807	        tiled_mma_pv,
808	        tiled_mma_pv_epi,
809	        mO,
810	        sVt,  # for PV partition_B
811	        sP,
812	        sScale,
813	        sO,
814	        tma_atom_O,
815	        pipeline_v,
816	        pipeline_P,  # sP cross-WG mbarrier
817	        pipeline_Scale,  # sScale cross-WG mbarrier
818	        tidx_in_wg,
819	        block_info,
820	        SeqlenInfoCls,
821	        TileSchedulerCls,
822	      )
823	
824	  @cute.jit
825	  def producer(
826	    self,
827	    mQ: cute.Tensor,
828	    mK: cute.Tensor,
829	    mV: cute.Tensor,
830	    sQ: cute.Tensor,
831	    sK: cute.Tensor,
832	    sV: cute.Tensor,
833	    tma_atom_Q: Optional[cute.CopyAtom],
834	    tma_atom_K: cute.CopyAtom,
835	    tma_atom_V: cute.CopyAtom,
836	    pipeline_q: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
837	    pipeline_k: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
838	    pipeline_v: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
839	    block_info: BlockInfo,
840	    SeqlenInfoCls: Callable,
841	    TileSchedulerCls: Callable,
842	  ):
843	    """Independent TMA producer warp group (warp_group_idx==0).
844	
845	        Only warp-0 (elect_one) issues TMA loads; the remaining 96 threads idle
846	        with reduced register budget. Q is loaded once per work-tile (full-D
847	        64×512); K and V are loaded per K-stage along the n_block sweep.
848	
849	        Synchronization: consumer-side pipelines (pipeline_q/k/v) carry an
850	        empty-mbarrier credit cycle, so producer_acquire on each load naturally
851	        waits for WG1/WG2 to release the previous slot. This subsumes the
852	        QueryEmpty / barrier_Q semantics under CUTe DSL's PipelineTmaAsync.
853	        """
854	    warp_idx_in_wg = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx()) % 4
855	    is_tma_warp = warp_idx_in_wg == 0
856	
857	    if is_tma_warp:
858	      q_producer_state = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
859	        pipeline.PipelineUserType.Producer, self.num_stages_q
860	      )
861	      k_producer_state = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
862	        pipeline.PipelineUserType.Producer, self.num_stages_k
863	      )
864	      v_producer_state = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
865	        pipeline.PipelineUserType.Producer, self.num_stages_v
866	      )
867	
868	      did_produce_q = Boolean(False)
869	      did_produce_k = Boolean(False)
870	      did_produce_v = Boolean(False)
871	
872	      tile_scheduler = TileSchedulerCls()
873	      work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
874	
875	      while work_tile.is_valid_tile:
876	        m_block, head_idx, batch_idx, _ = work_tile.tile_idx
877	        seqlen = SeqlenInfoCls(batch_idx)
878	        mQ_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mQ, batch_idx, dim=3)[None, None,
879	                                                             head_idx]
880	        head_idx_kv = (
881	          head_idx //
882	          self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(not self.pack_gqa) else head_idx
883	        )
884	        mK_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_K(mK, batch_idx, dim=3)[None, None,
885	                                                             head_idx_kv]
886	        mV_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_K(mV, batch_idx, dim=3)[None, None,
887	                                                             head_idx_kv]
888	
889	        n_block_min, n_block_max = block_info.get_n_block_min_max(
890	          seqlen, m_block
891	        )
892	        n_block_count = n_block_max - n_block_min
893	        if n_block_count < 0:
894	          n_block_count = Int32(0)
895	
896	        if n_block_count > 0:
897	          # ── Q load (full-D, one-shot per work-tile) ──
898	          gQ = cute.local_tile(
899	            mQ_cur, (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdim_full), (None, 0)
900	          )
901	          load_Q, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
902	            tma_atom_Q,
903	            0,
904	            cute.make_layout(1),
905	            gQ,
906	            sQ,
907	          )
908	          pipeline_q.producer_acquire(q_producer_state)
909	          load_Q(
910	            src_idx=m_block,
911	            dst_idx=q_producer_state.index,
912	            tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_q.producer_get_barrier(q_producer_state),
913	          )
914	          pipeline_q.producer_commit(q_producer_state)
915	          did_produce_q = Boolean(True)
916	          q_producer_state.advance()
917	
918	          # ── K/V loop along n_blocks (reverse order matches consumer) ──
919	          for i_n in cutlass.range(n_block_count, unroll=1):
920	            n_block = n_block_max - 1 - i_n
921	            # K full-D
922	            gK = cute.local_tile(
923	              mK_cur, (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdim_full), (None, 0)
924	            )
925	            load_K, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
926	              tma_atom_K,
927	              0,
928	              cute.make_layout(1),
929	              gK,
930	              sK,
931	            )
932	            pipeline_k.producer_acquire(k_producer_state)
933	            load_K(
934	              src_idx=n_block,
935	              dst_idx=k_producer_state.index,
936	              tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_k.producer_get_barrier(k_producer_state),
937	            )
938	            pipeline_k.producer_commit(k_producer_state)
939	            did_produce_k = Boolean(True)
940	            k_producer_state.advance()
941	            # V full-hdimv (per K-stage)
942	            gV = cute.local_tile(
943	              mV_cur, (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdimv), (None, 0)
944	            )
945	            load_V, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
946	              tma_atom_V,
947	              0,
948	              cute.make_layout(1),
949	              gV,
950	              sV,
951	            )
952	            pipeline_v.producer_acquire(v_producer_state)
953	            load_V(
954	              src_idx=n_block,
955	              dst_idx=v_producer_state.index,
956	              tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_v.producer_get_barrier(v_producer_state),
957	            )
958	            pipeline_v.producer_commit(v_producer_state)
959	            did_produce_v = Boolean(True)
960	            v_producer_state.advance()
961	
962	        tile_scheduler.advance_to_next_work()
963	        work_tile = tile_scheduler.get_current_work()
964	
965	      # Producer tail — flush remaining producer states
966	      if did_produce_q:
967	        pipeline_q.producer_tail(q_producer_state)
968	      if did_produce_k:
969	        pipeline_k.producer_tail(k_producer_state)
970	      if did_produce_v:
971	        pipeline_v.producer_tail(v_producer_state)
972	
973	  @cute.jit
974	  def mma_wg1(
975	    self,
976	    tiled_mma_qk: cute.TiledMma,
977	    tiled_mma_pv: cute.TiledMma,

1008	    )
1009	    thr_mma_qk = tiled_mma_qk.get_slice(tidx)

1024	      wg_mma_qk,
1025	      (self.tile_m, self.tile_n, self.tile_hdim_full),
1026	      sQ,
1027	      sK,
1028	    )

1031	    _, tOrP_smem, tOrV = sm90_utils.partition_fragment_ABC(
1032	      wg_mma_pv,
1033	      (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv, self.tile_n),
1034	      sP,
1035	      sVt,
1036	    )

1038	    _, _tOrP_rmem_template, tOrV_wg1 = sm90_utils.partition_fragment_ABC(
1039	      wg_mma_pv_wg1,

1041	      None,

1043	    )

1064	    )

1066	      pipeline.PipelineUserType.Consumer, self.num_stages_v
1067	    )

1111	        thr_mma=thr_mma_qk,

1177

1343	  @cute.jit
1344	  def _mma_wg1_one_n_block(
1345	    self,
1346	    n_block: Int32,
1347	    acc_S_cur: cute.
1348	    Tensor,  # holds QK[n_block] from prev iter step C (or pre-loop pre-issue on iter 0)
1349	    acc_S_nxt: cute.Tensor,  # receives QK[n_block+1] in step C (if not is_last)
1350	    acc_O_front: cute.Tensor,
1351	    sP: cute.Tensor,
1352	    sScale: cute.Tensor,
1353	    tSrQ: cute.Tensor,
1354	    tSrK: cute.Tensor,
1355	    tOrP_smem: cute.Tensor,
1356	    tOrV: cute.Tensor,
1357	    tOrV_wg1: cute.Tensor,  # WG1 RS-mode B (same as tOrV but typed for RS path)
1358	    smem_copy_atom_P: cute.CopyAtom,
1359	    smem_thr_copy_P: cute.TiledCopy,
1360	    tiled_mma_qk: cute.TiledMma,
1361	    tiled_mma_pv: cute.TiledMma,
1362	    tiled_mma_pv_wg1: cute.TiledMma,  # 5.5f: WG1 RS-mode tiled_mma
1363	    pipeline_k: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1364	    pipeline_v: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1365	    pipeline_P: pipeline.PipelineAsync,  # WG1 producer side
1366	    pipeline_Scale: pipeline.PipelineAsync,  # WG1 producer on sScale
1367	    q_consumer_state: pipeline.PipelineState,
1368	    k_consumer_state: pipeline.PipelineState,
1369	    v_consumer_state: pipeline.PipelineState,
1370	    pipeline_state_P_producer,  # producer state (advances each iter)
1371	    pipeline_state_Scale_producer,  # sScale producer state
1372	    softmax: Softmax,
1373	    seqlen: SeqlenInfoQK,
1374	    tidx: Int32,
1375	    is_last_n_block: bool,  # runtime: skip step C pre-issue at end of tile
1376	    score_mod_fn: Optional[Callable] = None,
1377	    mask_fn: Optional[Callable] = None,
1378	    mask_seqlen: cutlass.Constexpr[bool] = False,
1379	    is_first_n_block: cutlass.Constexpr[bool] = False,
1380	  ):
1381	    """async pipeline iteration of WG1.
1382	
1383	        Caller alternates acc_S_cur/acc_S_nxt buffer roles every iter via
1384	        explicit kwargs (see mma_wg1's pair-loop) so no runtime slot dispatch
1385	        is needed inside the body.
1386	        """
1387	    p_stage = Int32(pipeline_state_P_producer.index)
1388	
1389	    # ═══ step A: drain pre-issued QK[n_block] (and prev iter's PV-front) ═══
1390	    cute.nvgpu.warpgroup.wait_group(0)
1391	
1392	    # ═══ step B: release K[n_block]; release V[n_block-1] if not first ═══
1393	    cur_k_stage = Int32(k_consumer_state.index)
1394	    prev_stage_idx = (cur_k_stage +
1395	                      Int32(self.num_stages_k - 1)) % Int32(self.num_stages_k)
1396	    with cute.arch.elect_one():
1397	      pipeline_k.consumer_release(k_consumer_state)
1398	    if const_expr(not is_first_n_block):
1399	      with cute.arch.elect_one():
1400	        pipeline_v.consumer_release(v_consumer_state)
1401	
1402	    # ═══ step C: pre-issue QK[n_block+1] async into acc_S_nxt ═══
1403	    if not is_last_n_block:
1404	      k_consumer_state.advance()
1405	      pipeline_k.consumer_wait(
1406	        k_consumer_state, pipeline_k.consumer_try_wait(k_consumer_state)
1407	      )
1408	      sm90_utils.gemm_w_idx(
1409	        tiled_mma_qk,
1410	        acc_S_nxt,
1411	        tSrQ,
1412	        tSrK,
1413	        zero_init=True,
1414	        A_idx=q_consumer_state.index,  # sQ stage = 0 (single Q buf per tile)
1415	        B_idx=k_consumer_state.index,  # K[n_block+1] stage (post-advance)
1416	        wg_wait=-1,  # async — drained at next iter's step A
1417	      )
1418	      # K[n_block+1] is held; next iter's step B (or finalize) releases.
1419	
1420	    # ═══ step D: softmax on acc_S_cur (overlaps with step C's WGMMA on TC) ═══
1421	    if const_expr(score_mod_fn is not None):
1422	      score_mod_fn(acc_S_cur, n_block=n_block, seqlen=seqlen)
1423	    partial(mask_fn, mask_mod=self.mask_mod, mask_seqlen=mask_seqlen)(
1424	      acc_S=acc_S_cur,
1425	      n_block=n_block,
1426	    )
1427	    row_scale = softmax.online_softmax(
1428	      acc_S_cur,
1429	      is_first=is_first_n_block,
1430	      check_inf=True,
1431	    )
1432	
1433	    # store_scale + pipeline_Scale
1434	    if const_expr(not is_first_n_block):
1435	      pipeline_Scale.producer_acquire(pipeline_state_Scale_producer)
1436	      store_scale_to_smem(
1437	        row_scale,
1438	        sScale,
1439	        prev_stage_idx,
1440	        tiled_mma_qk,
1441	        tidx,
1442	        self.tile_m,
1443	        self.tile_n,
1444	      )
1445	      # sScale store is generic-proxy (regular SMEM store, not STSM/TMA);
1446	      cute.arch.sync_warp()
1447	      pipeline_Scale.producer_commit(pipeline_state_Scale_producer)
1448	      pipeline_state_Scale_producer.advance()
1449	
1450	    # ═══ step E: convert acc_S_cur → tOrP (bf16 in registers) ═══
1451	    tOrP_acc = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_frgA(acc_S_cur)
1452	    tOrP = cute.make_fragment_like(tOrP_acc, self.dtype)
1453	    tOrP.store(tOrP_acc.load().to(self.dtype))
1454	
1455	    # ═══ step F pipeline_P producer_acquire → STSM(sP) → rescale_O →
1456	    # fence → pipeline_P producer_commit
1457	    pipeline_P.producer_acquire(pipeline_state_P_producer)
1458	    cute.copy(
1459	      smem_copy_atom_P,
1460	      smem_thr_copy_P.retile(tOrP),
1461	      smem_thr_copy_P.partition_D(sP[None, None, p_stage]),
1462	    )
1463	    if const_expr(not is_first_n_block):
1464	      softmax.rescale_O(acc_O_front, row_scale)
1465	    cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1466	    cute.arch.sync_warp()
1467	    pipeline_P.producer_commit(pipeline_state_P_producer)
1468	    pipeline_state_P_producer.advance()
1469	
1470	    # ═══ step G: advance V (skip on first), wait V[n_block], PV-front async ═══
1471	    if const_expr(not is_first_n_block):
1472	      v_consumer_state.advance()
1473	    pipeline_v.consumer_wait(
1474	      v_consumer_state, pipeline_v.consumer_try_wait(v_consumer_state)
1475	    )
1476	    # RS-mode PV-front. A operand = tOrP (rmem); WG2 still uses SS-mode
1477	    # via tiled_mma_pv. Eliminates SS-mode SMEM descriptor read for WG1's
1478	    # own PV-front WGMMA — modest TC pipeline startup latency saving (+3
1479	    # TFLOPS empirically).
1480	    sm90_utils.gemm_w_idx(
1481	      tiled_mma_pv_wg1,
1482	      acc_O_front,
1483	      tOrP,
1484	      tOrV_wg1,
1485	      zero_init=is_first_n_block,
1486	      A_idx=None,
1487	      B_idx=v_consumer_state.index,
1488	      wg_wait=-1,  # async — drained at next iter's step A or finalize
1489	    )
1490	    # V[n_block] is held; next iter's step B (or finalize) releases.
1491	    return k_consumer_state, v_consumer_state, pipeline_state_P_producer, pipeline_state_Scale_producer
1492	
1493	  @cute.jit
1494	  def mma_wg2(
1495	    self,
1496	    tiled_mma_pv: cute.TiledMma,
1497	    tiled_mma_pv_epi: cute.TiledMma,
1498	    mO: cute.Tensor,
1499	    sVt: cute.Tensor,  # transpose-view for PV partition_B
1500	    sP: cute.Tensor,
1501	    sScale: cute.Tensor,
1502	    sO: cute.Tensor,
1503	    tma_atom_O: Optional[cute.CopyAtom],
1504	    pipeline_v: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1505	    pipeline_P: pipeline.PipelineAsync,  # cross-WG sP handshake
1506	    pipeline_Scale: pipeline.PipelineAsync,  # cross-WG sScale handshake
1507	    tidx_in_wg: Int32,
1508	    block_info: BlockInfo,
1509	    SeqlenInfoCls: Callable,
1510	    TileSchedulerCls: Callable,
1511	  ):
1512	    """WG2 (style): PV-back consumer (atom 1) + WG2-half epilogue. No producer role.
1513	
1514	        tidx_in_wg ∈ [0, 128) is WG-local (CTA-absolute thread is in [256, 384) because
1515	        WG2 sits at warp_group_idx==2). For tiled_mma_pv.get_slice() and load_scale_from_smem
1516	        we need WG2's index *within tiled_mma_pv* which has only 256 threads (2 atoms × 128):
1517	        atom 0 = 0..127 (WG1), atom 1 = 128..255 (WG2). Hence tidx_global = tidx_in_wg + 128,
1518	        not + 256. Passing the CTA-absolute id would index out of the tiled_mma_pv slice
1519	        range and deadlock the PV consumer.
1520	        """
1521	    tidx_global = tidx_in_wg + self.num_threads_per_warp_group  # ∈ [128, 256), WG2 = atom 1 slice
1522	
1523	    warp_group_thread_layout = cute.make_layout(
1524	      self.num_wg_mma, stride=self.num_threads_per_warp_group
1525	    )
1526	    # WG2 covers PV atom 1; use the WG-level slice for fragments
1527	    wg_mma_pv = tiled_mma_pv.get_slice(warp_group_thread_layout(1))
1528	
1529	    # PV-back fragments (sVt has N=tile_hdimv contiguous as required by MN-major B)
1530	    _, tOrP_smem, tOrV = sm90_utils.partition_fragment_ABC(
1531	      wg_mma_pv,
1532	      (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv, self.tile_n),
1533	      sP,
1534	      sVt,
1535	    )
1536	    # acc_O_back: per-thread fragment (WG2's slice → atom-1 / cols 256:512)
1537	    acc_O_back = cute.make_rmem_tensor(
1538	      tiled_mma_pv.partition_shape_C((self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv)),
1539	      Float32,
1540	    )
1541	
1542	    # ── Startup: WG1's main-loop PFull/PEmpty are migrated to pipeline_P
1543	    cute.arch.barrier_arrive(
1544	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.PEmpty),
1545	      number_of_threads=self.num_mma_threads,
1546	    )
1547	
1548	    v_consumer_state = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
1549	      pipeline.PipelineUserType.Consumer, self.num_stages_v
1550	    )
1551	    # WG2 is consumer on pipeline_P. Initial phase=0 — first wait
1552	    # blocks until WG1's first producer_commit arrives.
1553	    pipeline_state_P_consumer = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
1554	      pipeline.PipelineUserType.Consumer, self.num_stages_sP_buf
1555	    )
1556	    # WG2 is consumer on pipeline_Scale. Same Consumer init pattern.
1557	    pipeline_state_Scale_consumer = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
1558	      pipeline.PipelineUserType.Consumer, self.num_stages_p
1559	    )
1560	
1561	    tile_scheduler = TileSchedulerCls()
1562	    work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
1563	
1564	    while work_tile.is_valid_tile:
1565	      m_block, head_idx, batch_idx, _ = work_tile.tile_idx
1566	      seqlen = SeqlenInfoCls(batch_idx)
1567	
1568	      n_block_min, n_block_max = block_info.get_n_block_min_max(seqlen, m_block)
1569	      n_block_count = n_block_max - n_block_min
1570	      if n_block_count < 0:
1571	        n_block_count = Int32(0)
1572	
1573	      if n_block_count > 0:
1574	        mma_one_n_block = partial(
1575	          self._mma_wg2_one_n_block,
1576	          acc_O_back=acc_O_back,
1577	          sP=sP,
1578	          sScale=sScale,
1579	          tOrP_smem=tOrP_smem,
1580	          tOrV=tOrV,
1581	          tiled_mma_pv=tiled_mma_pv,
1582	          pipeline_v=pipeline_v,
1583	          pipeline_P=pipeline_P,
1584	          pipeline_Scale=pipeline_Scale,
1585	          tidx_global=tidx_global,
1586	        )
1587	        # First n_block: is_first=True. No stage advance; consume stage 0.
1588	        v_consumer_state, pipeline_state_P_consumer, pipeline_state_Scale_consumer = mma_one_n_block(
1589	          n_block=n_block_max - 1,
1590	          v_consumer_state=v_consumer_state,
1591	          pipeline_state_P_consumer=pipeline_state_P_consumer,
1592	          pipeline_state_Scale_consumer=pipeline_state_Scale_consumer,
1593	          is_first_n_block=True,
1594	        )
1595	        # Remaining n_blocks (in reverse). Each one advances V stage.
1596	        for i_n in cutlass.range(n_block_count - 1, unroll=1):
1597	          n_block = n_block_max - 2 - i_n
1598	          v_consumer_state, pipeline_state_P_consumer, pipeline_state_Scale_consumer = mma_one_n_block(
1599	            n_block=n_block,
1600	            v_consumer_state=v_consumer_state,
1601	            pipeline_state_P_consumer=pipeline_state_P_consumer,
1602	            pipeline_state_Scale_consumer=pipeline_state_Scale_consumer,
1603	            is_first_n_block=False,
1604	          )
1605	
1606	        # ─── Finalize: receive final row_scale from WG1 ───
1607	        # Stage index alignment:
1608	        cute.arch.barrier(
1609	          barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.PFull),
1610	          number_of_threads=self.num_mma_threads,
1611	        )
1612	        row_scale_final = load_scale_from_smem(
1613	          sScale,
1614	          Int32(v_consumer_state.index),
1615	          tiled_mma_pv,
1616	          tidx_global,
1617	          self.tile_m,
1618	          self.tile_hdimv_half,
1619	          num_rows=2,
1620	        )
1621	        rescale_O_with_external_scale(acc_O_back, row_scale_final)
1622	        # Polite-close arrive on PEmpty
1623	        # normalizes barrier counter for persistent-kernel buffer reuse
1624	        cute.arch.barrier_arrive(
1625	          barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.PEmpty),
1626	          number_of_threads=self.num_mma_threads,
1627	        )
1628	        # ─── Epilogue: write O[:, 256:512] ───
1629	        self.epilogue_wg(
1630	          acc_O_back,
1631	          None,
1632	          mO,
1633	          None,
1634	          sO,
1635	          seqlen,
1636	          tma_atom_O,
1637	          tiled_mma_pv_epi,
1638	          tidx_in_wg,
1639	          m_block,
1640	          head_idx,
1641	          batch_idx,
1642	          wg_idx=1,
1643	          write_lse=False,
1644	        )
1645	
1646	        # ─── Close the tile's V pipeline phase ───
1647	        v_consumer_state.advance()
1648	      # else: empty tile; _interface.py pre-inits O=0
1649	
1650	      tile_scheduler.advance_to_next_work()
1651	      work_tile = tile_scheduler.get_current_work()
1652	
1653	  @cute.jit
1654	  def _mma_wg2_one_n_block(
1655	    self,
1656	    n_block: Int32,
1657	    acc_O_back: cute.Tensor,
1658	    sP: cute.Tensor,
1659	    sScale: cute.Tensor,
1660	    tOrP_smem: cute.Tensor,
1661	    tOrV: cute.Tensor,
1662	    tiled_mma_pv: cute.TiledMma,
1663	    pipeline_v: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1664	    pipeline_P: pipeline.PipelineAsync,  # WG2 consumer side
1665	    pipeline_Scale: pipeline.PipelineAsync,  # WG2 consumer on sScale
1666	    v_consumer_state: pipeline.PipelineState,
1667	    pipeline_state_P_consumer,  # consumer state (advances each iter)
1668	    pipeline_state_Scale_consumer,  # sScale consumer state
1669	    tidx_global: Int32,
1670	    is_first_n_block: cutlass.Constexpr[bool] = False,
1671	  ):
1672	    """One K-stage iteration of WG2: PV-back (atom 1) + cross-WG sP/sScale handoff.
1673	
1674	        Stage semantics:
1675	          - sync(PFull) — wait WG1 to publish sP[0] + sScale[prev].
1676	          - load_scales(current) — read sScale[v_consumer_state.index] AFTER
1677	            barrier; WG1 already wrote into the slot indexed by the *previous*
1678	            iter (in WG1's view), which equals WG2's *current* index.
1679	          - Then advance V stage (non-first) and consume sV[v.index] for PV-back.
1680	        """
1681	    p_stage = Int32(pipeline_state_P_consumer.index)
1682	
1683	    if const_expr(not is_first_n_block):
1684	      # pipeline_Scale.consumer_wait replaces barrier(ScaleReady).
1685	      # WG2 waits for WG1's producer_commit on the sScale slot it's about
1686	      # to read. Slot index is v_consumer_state.index (= stage_of_V[k-1]),
1687	      # same physical slot WG1 wrote via prev_stage_idx.
1688	      pipeline_Scale.consumer_wait(pipeline_state_Scale_consumer)
1689	      row_scale_back = load_scale_from_smem(
1690	        sScale,
1691	        Int32(v_consumer_state.index),
1692	        tiled_mma_pv,
1693	        tidx_global,
1694	        self.tile_m,
1695	        self.tile_hdimv_half,
1696	        num_rows=2,
1697	      )
1698	      pipeline_Scale.consumer_release(pipeline_state_Scale_consumer)
1699	      pipeline_state_Scale_consumer.advance()
1700	      v_consumer_state.advance()
1701	      v_phase = pipeline_v.consumer_try_wait(v_consumer_state)
1702	      rescale_O_with_external_scale(acc_O_back, row_scale_back)
1703	    else:
1704	      # First iter: WG1 didn't write sScale; just pre-issue V try_wait.
1705	      v_phase = pipeline_v.consumer_try_wait(v_consumer_state)
1706	
1707	    # ─── Wait sP ready (5.5b: pipeline_P.consumer_wait replaces PFull) ───
1708	    pipeline_P.consumer_wait(pipeline_state_P_consumer)
1709	    pipeline_v.consumer_wait(v_consumer_state, v_phase)
1710	    sm90_utils.gemm_w_idx(
1711	      tiled_mma_pv,
1712	      acc_O_back,
1713	      tOrP_smem,
1714	      tOrV,
1715	      zero_init=is_first_n_block,
1716	      A_idx=p_stage,
1717	      B_idx=v_consumer_state.index,
1718	      wg_wait=0,
1719	    )
1720	    # Release V (each WG contributes 4 elect_one arrivals; total 8 = cg.size).
1721	    with cute.arch.elect_one():
1722	      pipeline_v.consumer_release(v_consumer_state)
1723	    # Note: don't advance v_consumer_state here — next iter does
1724	    # snapshot+advance via the returned state; symmetric with WG1's pattern.
1725	
1726	    # ─── 5.5b: consumer_release on pipeline_P (replaces PEmpty arrive) ───
1727	    pipeline_P.consumer_release(pipeline_state_P_consumer)
1728	    pipeline_state_P_consumer.advance()
1729	    return v_consumer_state, pipeline_state_P_consumer, pipeline_state_Scale_consumer
1730	
1731	  @cute.jit
1732	  def epilogue_wg(
1733	    self,
1734	    acc_O: cute.Tensor,
1735	    lse: Optional[cute.Tensor],
1736	    mO: cute.Tensor,
1737	    mLSE: Optional[cute.Tensor],
1738	    sO: cute.Tensor,
1739	    seqlen: SeqlenInfoQK,
1740	    tma_atom_O: cute.CopyAtom,
1741	    tiled_mma_pv: cute.TiledMma,
1742	    tidx: Int32,
1743	    m_block: Int32,
1744	    head_idx: Int32,
1745	    batch_idx: Int32,
1746	    wg_idx: cutlass.Constexpr[int],
1747	    write_lse: cutlass.Constexpr[bool] = False,
1748	  ):
1749	    """per-WG epilogue with concurrent sO writes (Opt-3, dual-slot sO).
1750	
1751	        sO has 2 stages — WG1 owns sO[0], WG2 owns sO[1]. Both WGs STSM into
1752	        their own slot and fire TMA store_O concurrently. Only 2 Epilogue
1753	        barriers remain:
1754	          1) sync at start (sV → sO union-slot lifetime transition)
1755	          2) final sync (TMA stores complete before next tile reuses SMEM)
1756	
1757	        LSE writes only happen in WG1 and use gmem directly (no sO conflict),
1758	        so they happen before the sO write region.
1759	        """
1760	    # Convert acc_O (fp32) → rO (bf16) in registers — per-thread, no SMEM.
1761	    rO = cute.make_fragment_like(acc_O, self.dtype)
1762	    rO.store(acc_O.load().to(self.dtype))
1763	
1764	    # SMEM/TMA fragments (compile-time setup; no SMEM access yet)
1765	    smem_copy_atom_O = utils.get_smem_store_atom(
1766	      self.arch.major * 10 + self.arch.minor, self.dtype
1767	    )
1768	    smem_thr_copy_O = cute.make_tiled_copy_C(smem_copy_atom_O,
1769	                                             tiled_mma_pv).get_slice(tidx)
1770	    taccOrO = smem_thr_copy_O.retile(rO)
1771	    taccOsO = smem_thr_copy_O.partition_D(sO[None, None, wg_idx])
1772	
1773	    ragged = seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_q
1774	    mO_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mO, batch_idx, dim=3,
1775	                                   ragged=ragged)[None, None, head_idx]
1776	    gO = cute.local_tile(
1777	      mO_cur, (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv_half), (m_block, wg_idx)
1778	    )
1779	    store_O, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
1780	      tma_atom_O,
1781	      0,
1782	      cute.make_layout(1),
1783	      sO[None, None, wg_idx],
1784	      gO,
1785	      single_stage=True,
1786	    )
1787	    warp_idx_in_wg = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx()) % 4
1788	
1789	    # ── LSE: WG1 only, gmem-only write (no sO interaction) ──
1790	    if const_expr(write_lse and mLSE is not None):
1791	      cO = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv_half))
1792	      mLSE_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mLSE, batch_idx, dim=2)[None, head_idx]
1793	      if const_expr(not self.pack_gqa):
1794	        gLSE = cute.local_tile(mLSE_cur, (self.tile_m, ), (m_block, ))
1795	        gLSE_expanded_layout = cute.append(
1796	          gLSE.layout, cute.make_layout((self.tile_hdimv_half, ), stride=(0, ))
1797	        )
1798	        gLSE_expanded = cute.make_tensor(gLSE.iterator, gLSE_expanded_layout)
1799	        thr_mma = tiled_mma_pv.get_slice(tidx)
1800	        taccOgLSE = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(
1801	          thr_mma.partition_C(gLSE_expanded)
1802	        )
1803	        taccOcO = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(thr_mma.partition_C(cO))
1804	        t0accOcO = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(
1805	          tiled_mma_pv.get_slice(0).partition_C(cO)
1806	        )
1807	        if taccOcO[0][1] == 0:
1808	          for m in cutlass.range(
1809	            cute.size(taccOgLSE.shape[1]), unroll_full=True
1810	          ):
1811	            if t0accOcO[
1812	              m,
1813	              0][0] < seqlen.seqlen_q - m_block * self.tile_m - taccOcO[0][0]:
1814	              taccOgLSE[m, 0] = lse[m]
1815	      else:
1816	        pack_gqa = PackGQA(
1817	          self.tile_m,
1818	          self.tile_hdimv_half,
1819	          self.check_hdim_v_oob,
1820	          self.qhead_per_kvhead,
1821	        )
1822	        pack_gqa.store_LSE(
1823	          mLSE_cur, lse, tiled_mma_pv, tidx, m_block, seqlen.seqlen_q
1824	        )
1825	
1826	    # ── Concurrent epilogue: WG1→sO[0], WG2→sO[1] (dual-slot sO) ──
1827	    cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1828	    cute.arch.barrier(
1829	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.Epilogue),
1830	      number_of_threads=self.num_mma_threads,
1831	    )
1832	    cute.copy(smem_copy_atom_O, taccOrO, taccOsO)
1833	    cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1834	    if warp_idx_in_wg == 0:
1835	      store_O()
1836	      cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_commit_group()
1837	      cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_wait_group(0, read=True)
1838	    # Final barrier: both WGs' TMA store_O have committed and the SMEM
1839	    # union slot is free again — required so the next work-tile can safely
1840	    # reuse the slot for sV loads.
1841	    cute.arch.barrier(
1842	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.Epilogue),
1843	      number_of_threads=self.num_mma_threads,
1844	    )
1845	
1846	  @cute.jit
1847	  def apply_score_mod(
1848	    self,
1849	    thr_mma_qk,
1850	    batch_idx,
1851	    head_idx,
1852	    m_block,
1853	    acc_S,
1854	    n_block,
1855	    softmax_scale,
1856	    seqlen,
1857	    aux_tensors: Optional[list] = None,
1858	    fastdiv_mods=None,
1859	  ):
1860	    cS = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.tile_m, self.tile_n))
1861	    cS = cute.domain_offset((m_block * self.tile_m, n_block * self.tile_n), cS)
1862	    tScS = thr_mma_qk.partition_C(cS)
1863	    apply_score_mod_inner(
1864	      acc_S,
1865	      tScS,
1866	      self.score_mod,
1867	      batch_idx,
1868	      head_idx,
1869	      softmax_scale,
1870	      self.vec_size,
1871	      self.qk_acc_dtype,
1872	      aux_tensors,
1873	      fastdiv_mods,
1874	      seqlen_info=seqlen,
1875	      constant_q_idx=None,
1876	      qhead_per_kvhead=self.qhead_per_kvhead
1877	      if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
1878	    )
1879
