1	# Copyright (c) DefTruth, qyjdef@163.com
2	# Copyright (c) Butterfingrz，13524387014@163.com
3	#
4	# The idea of splitting the backward pass into a separate dKdV kernel is
5	# inspired by
6	# https://github.com/Dao-AILab/flash-attention/blob/main/flash_attn/cute/sm100_hd256_2cta_fmha_backward_dkdvkernel.py
7	# The core implementation below is written from scratch for SM90 and follows
8	# the SplitD design from the ffpa-attn repo.
9	#
10	# SM90 Backward dKdV Kernel with 2-Pass D-Split + Dual-MMA-WG for head_dim=512.
11	#
12	# Architecture:
13	#   - 3 WGs / 384 threads:
14	#       WG0 producer (warp 0 issues TMA; warps 1–3 idle, regs decreased to 56)
15	#       WG1 MMA: S (P1) + softmax→P (P2) + dV (P5), 224 regs
16	#       WG2 MMA: dP (P3) + dS (P4) + dK (P6), 224 regs
17	#   - tile_m=64, tile_n=64, d_chunk=256, num_d_passes=2, num_d_inner=2
18	#   - K/V persistent SMEM: pre-loaded ONCE per work_tile (n_block) and reused
19	#     across all d_passes (K_persist_chunks=V_persist_chunks=2)
20	#   - Q/dO streaming via pipeline_A (2 stages)
21	#   - PdS_stage=1 (single buffer); WG1↔WG2 cross-WG handoff via PFull/PEmpty
22	#     NamedBarrier over 256 MMA threads
23	#   - sP_fp32 channel: WG1 writes both bf16 sP (for its own dV WGMMA SS A-operand)
24	#     and fp32 sP_fp32 in P2; WG2 reads sP_fp32 in P4 → no fp32→bf16→fp32 precision loss
25	#   - Per d_pass, 6 phases per (n_block, m_block), split across WG1/WG2:
26	#       Phase 1 [WG1]: S  = Σ_{d_inner=0..1} Q_d @ K_d^T   (K from sK_persist)
27	#       Phase 2 [WG1]: P  = exp2(S * scale_log2 - LSE); STSM → sP (bf16) + sP_fp32
28	#       Phase 3 [WG2]: dP = Σ_{d_inner=0..1} dO_d @ V_d^T  (V from sV_persist)
29	#       Phase 4 [WG2]: dS = P * (dP - dPsum) * softmax_scale; STSM → sdS
30	#       Phase 5 [WG1]: dV += P^T  @ dO_d_pass   (sP   via SMEM, SS-mode WGMMA)
31	#       Phase 6 [WG2]: dK += dS^T @ Q_d_pass    (sdS  via SMEM, SS-mode WGMMA)
32	#   - mma_dkv_is_rs = False (P/dS routed through SMEM rather than registers)
33	
34	import math
35	from typing import Callable, Optional, Type
36	from functools import partial
37	
38	import cuda.bindings.driver as cuda
39	
40	import cutlass
41	import cutlass.cute as cute
42	import cutlass.utils.hopper_helpers as sm90_utils_basic
43	from cutlass.cute.nvgpu import OperandMajorMode, cpasync
44	from cutlass.cute import FastDivmodDivisor
45	from cutlass import Float32, Int32, Boolean, const_expr
46	from cutlass.utils import LayoutEnum
47	
48	from quack import copy_utils
49	from quack import layout_utils
50	from quack import sm90_utils
51	from quack.sm90_utils import gemm_w_idx
52	
53	from .utils.cute_dsl_utils import assume_tensor_aligned
54	from . import utils
55	from .utils.mask import AttentionMask
56	from .utils.seqlen_info import SeqlenInfoQK
57	from .utils.block_info import BlockInfo
58	from .utils import pipeline
59	from cutlass.pipeline import pipeline_init_arrive, pipeline_init_wait
60	from quack.cute_dsl_utils import ParamsBase
61	from .utils.tile_scheduler import (
62	  TileSchedulerArguments,
63	  SingleTileScheduler,
64	  SingleTileVarlenScheduler,
65	)
66	from .utils.named_barrier import NamedBarrierBwd
67	
68	
69	class FFPAAttnBwdDKDVSm90SplitD:
70	  """SM90 backward dKdV kernel (dual asymmetric MMA WG + d_chunk=256 + K/V persistence).
71	
72	    Computes only dK and dV (no dQ). dQ is handled by a separate kernel.
73	    Each CTA has 3 warp groups: 1 TMA producer + WG1 (S/softmax/dV) + WG2 (dP/dS/dK).
74	    """
75	
76	  arch = 90
77	
78	  def __init__(
79	    self,
80	    dtype: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
81	    head_dim: int,
82	    head_dim_v: Optional[int] = None,
83	    is_causal: bool = False,
84	    qhead_per_kvhead: int = 1,
85	    tile_m: int = 64,
86	    tile_n: int = 64,
87	  ):
88	    self.dtype = dtype
89	    hdim_multiple_of = 16
90	    self.tile_hdim = int(
91	      math.ceil(head_dim / hdim_multiple_of) * hdim_multiple_of
92	    )
93	    head_dim_v = head_dim_v if head_dim_v is not None else head_dim
94	    self.tile_hdimv = int(
95	      math.ceil(head_dim_v / hdim_multiple_of) * hdim_multiple_of
96	    )
97	    self.check_hdim_oob = head_dim != self.tile_hdim
98	    self.check_hdim_v_oob = head_dim_v != self.tile_hdimv
99	
100	    self.is_causal = is_causal
101	    self.qhead_per_kvhead = qhead_per_kvhead
102	    self.tile_m = tile_m
103	    self.tile_n = tile_n
104	    self.use_pdl = False
105	    self.qk_acc_dtype = Float32
106	    self.buffer_align_bytes = 1024
107	
108	    # ── SplitD parameters (d_chunk=256, num_d_passes=2, num_d_inner=2) ──
109	    self.d_chunk = 256  # output slice width for dK/dV
110	    self.num_d_passes = self.tile_hdim // self.d_chunk  # = 2
111	    self.num_d_inner = self.tile_hdim // self.d_chunk  # = 2
112	    assert self.tile_hdim % self.d_chunk == 0
113	    assert self.tile_hdimv % self.d_chunk == 0
114	
115	    # ── MMA WG configuration──
116	    # SdP MMA stays num_wg_mma=1 (each WG independently holds acc_S or acc_dP).
117	    # dV/dK MMA stays num_wg_mma=1 (only WG1 or WG2 partitions, never both).
118	    self.num_wg_mma_SdP = 1
119	    self.num_wg_mma_dKV = 1
120	    self.num_wg_mma = 1
121	    self.num_threads = 384
122	    self.num_threads_per_warp_group = 128
123	    self.num_producer_threads = 32  # actual producer worker threads (warp 0 elect_one)
124	    self.num_mma_threads = 256  # WG1 + WG2
125	    self.num_mma_regs_wg1 = 224
126	    self.num_mma_regs_wg2 = 224
127	    self.num_producer_regs = 56
128	
129	    # ── Pipeline stages──
130	    # A_stage 3→2: d_chunk=256 doubles per-stage size; drop one stage to fit SMEM ≤ 228KB.
131	    self.A_stage = 2
132	    # sP/sdS single-buffered; PFull/PEmpty (256-thread named barrier) serializes cross-WG handoff.
133	    self.PdS_stage = 1
134	
135	    # ── K/V persistence : preload ONCE per work_tile, reused across d_pass ──
136	    self.K_persist_chunks = self.num_d_inner  # = 2 chunks of d_chunk=256
137	    self.V_persist_chunks = self.num_d_inner  # = 2
138	
139	    # ── MMA layout configuration ──
140	    self.SdP_swapAB = False
141	    self.dKV_swapAB = False
142	    self.AtomLayoutMSdP = 1
143	    self.AtomLayoutNdKV = 1
144	    self.mma_dkv_is_rs = False
145	
146	  def _setup_attributes(self):
147	    # sA: (tile_m, d_chunk) — holds Q_chunk, dO_chunk, dO_d_pass, Q_d_pass
148	    self.sA_layout = sm90_utils.make_smem_layout(
149	      self.dtype,
150	      LayoutEnum.ROW_MAJOR,
151	      (self.tile_m, self.d_chunk),
152	      stage=self.A_stage,
153	      major_mode_size=self.d_chunk,  # accommodate sA^T
154	    )
155	    # sK_persist: (tile_n, d_chunk) × num_d_inner — persistent K across all
156	    # d_passes / q_heads / m_blocks within one work_tile (n_block).
157	    self.sK_persist_layout = sm90_utils.make_smem_layout(
158	      self.dtype,
159	      LayoutEnum.ROW_MAJOR,
160	      (self.tile_n, self.d_chunk),
161	      stage=self.K_persist_chunks,
162	    )
163	    # sV_persist: (tile_n, d_chunk) × num_d_inner — persistent V across all
164	    # d_passes / q_heads / m_blocks within one work_tile (n_block).
165	    self.sV_persist_layout = sm90_utils.make_smem_layout(
166	      self.dtype,
167	      LayoutEnum.ROW_MAJOR,
168	      (self.tile_n, self.d_chunk),
169	      stage=self.V_persist_chunks,
170	    )
171	    # sB_epi_layout: per-chunk layout for epilogue TMA store (same as K/V per-chunk)
172	    self.sB_epi_layout = cute.select(self.sK_persist_layout, mode=[0, 1])
173	    # sP: (tile_m, tile_n) — P for dV GEMM A operand
174	    wg_n_SdP = self.num_wg_mma // self.AtomLayoutMSdP
175	    wg_n_dKV = self.AtomLayoutNdKV
176	    self.sPdS_layout = sm90_utils.make_smem_layout(
177	      self.dtype,
178	      LayoutEnum.ROW_MAJOR,
179	      (self.tile_m, self.tile_n),
180	      stage=self.PdS_stage,
181	      major_mode_size=math.gcd(
182	        self.tile_n // wg_n_SdP, self.tile_n // wg_n_dKV
183	      ),
184	    )
185	    # bf16-roundtrip-free P channel:
186	    # sP_fp32 holds the SAME P values as sP (bf16) but in fp32. WG1 writes both;
187	    # WG1 dV WGMMA still reads bf16 sP (WGMMA requires bf16/fp16 A operand).
188	    # WG2 reads sP_fp32 for dS = P*(dP-dPsum)*scale → no fp32→bf16→fp32 precision loss.
189	    self.sP_fp32_layout = sm90_utils.make_smem_layout(
190	      Float32,
191	      LayoutEnum.ROW_MAJOR,
192	      (self.tile_m, self.tile_n),
193	      stage=self.PdS_stage,
194	      major_mode_size=math.gcd(
195	        self.tile_n // wg_n_SdP, self.tile_n // wg_n_dKV
196	      ),
197	    )
198	
199	  def _get_tiled_mma(self):
200	    # ── SdP: S = Q @ K^T, dP = dO @ V^T ──
201	    # shape_mnk: (tile_m, tile_n, d_chunk) = (64, 64, 256)
202	    atom_layout_SdP = (
203	      self.AtomLayoutMSdP, self.num_wg_mma // self.AtomLayoutMSdP, 1
204	    )
205	    tiler_mn_SdP = (
206	      self.tile_m // atom_layout_SdP[0], self.tile_n // atom_layout_SdP[1]
207	    )
208	    tiled_mma_SdP = sm90_utils_basic.make_trivial_tiled_mma(
209	      self.dtype,
210	      self.dtype,
211	      OperandMajorMode.K,
212	      OperandMajorMode.K,
213	      self.qk_acc_dtype,
214	      atom_layout_mnk=atom_layout_SdP,
215	      tiler_mn=tiler_mn_SdP,
216	    )
217	
218	    # ── dKV: dV = P^T @ dO_d, dK = dS^T @ Q_d ──
219	    # shape_mnk: (tile_n, d_chunk, tile_m) = (64, 256, 64)
220	    atom_layout_dKV = (
221	      self.AtomLayoutNdKV, self.num_wg_mma // self.AtomLayoutNdKV, 1
222	    )
223	    # dV: M=tile_n, N=d_chunk
224	    tiler_mn_dV = (
225	      self.tile_n // atom_layout_dKV[0], self.d_chunk // atom_layout_dKV[1]
226	    )
227	    tiled_mma_dV = sm90_utils_basic.make_trivial_tiled_mma(
228	      self.dtype,
229	      self.dtype,
230	      OperandMajorMode.MN,
231	      OperandMajorMode.MN,
232	      Float32,
233	      atom_layout_mnk=atom_layout_dKV,
234	      tiler_mn=tiler_mn_dV,
235	    )
236	    # dK: same shape as dV
237	    tiler_mn_dK = (
238	      self.tile_n // atom_layout_dKV[0], self.d_chunk // atom_layout_dKV[1]
239	    )
240	    tiled_mma_dK = sm90_utils_basic.make_trivial_tiled_mma(
241	      self.dtype,
242	      self.dtype,
243	      OperandMajorMode.MN,
244	      OperandMajorMode.MN,
245	      Float32,
246	      atom_layout_mnk=atom_layout_dKV,
247	      tiler_mn=tiler_mn_dK,
248	    )
249	    return tiled_mma_SdP, tiled_mma_dK, tiled_mma_dV
250	
251	  def _get_shared_storage_cls(self):
252	    sA_struct = cute.struct.Align[
253	      cute.struct.MemRange[self.dtype, cute.cosize(self.sA_layout)],
254	      self.buffer_align_bytes,
255	    ]
256	    sK_persist_struct = cute.struct.Align[
257	      cute.struct.MemRange[self.dtype,
258	                           cute.cosize(self.sK_persist_layout)],
259	      self.buffer_align_bytes,
260	    ]
261	    sV_persist_struct = cute.struct.Align[
262	      cute.struct.MemRange[self.dtype,
263	                           cute.cosize(self.sV_persist_layout)],
264	      self.buffer_align_bytes,
265	    ]
266	    # Single-stage epilogue staging buffer for per-d_pass dK/dV TMA store.
267	    # NOTE: shares physical SMEM with sA via SmemAEpi_t union (see below).
268	    sEpi_struct = cute.struct.Align[
269	      cute.struct.MemRange[self.dtype,
270	                           cute.cosize(self.sB_epi_layout)],
271	      self.buffer_align_bytes,
272	    ]
273	
274	    # Physical size = max(sA = A_stage × d_chunk-stage size, sEpi = tile_n × d_chunk).
275	    @cute.union
276	    class SmemAEpi_t:
277	      sA: sA_struct  # mainloop: pipeline_A items (Q/dO/dO_d_pass/Q_d_pass)
278	      sEpi: sEpi_struct  # epilogue: dV (WG1) → dK (WG2) staging via TMA store
279	
280	    @cute.struct
281	    class SharedStorageDKDV:
282	      mbar_ptr_A: cute.struct.MemRange[cutlass.Int64, self.A_stage * 2]
283	      mbar_ptr_K: cute.struct.MemRange[cutlass.Int64, self.K_persist_chunks * 2]
284	      mbar_ptr_V: cute.struct.MemRange[cutlass.Int64, self.V_persist_chunks * 2]
285	      sLSE: cute.struct.MemRange[
286	        Float32,
287	        cute.round_up(self.tile_m, 64) * self.A_stage,
288	      ]
289	      sdPsum: cute.struct.MemRange[
290	        Float32,
291	        cute.round_up(self.tile_m, 64) * self.A_stage,
292	      ]
293	      sAEpi: SmemAEpi_t  # sA (mainloop) | sEpi (epilogue)
294	      sK_persist: sK_persist_struct
295	      sV_persist: sV_persist_struct
296	      sP: cute.struct.Align[cute.struct.MemRange[self.dtype,
297	                                                 cute.cosize(self.sPdS_layout)],
298	                            1024]
299	      # Bf16-roundtrip-free P channel: WG1 writes fp32 P here in P2,
300	      # WG2 reads it in P4 for dS computation. Avoids fp32→bf16→fp32 precision loss.
301	      sP_fp32: cute.struct.Align[cute.struct.MemRange[
302	        Float32, cute.cosize(self.sP_fp32_layout)], 1024]
303	      sdS: cute.struct.Align[cute.struct.MemRange[
304	        self.dtype, cute.cosize(self.sPdS_layout)], 1024]
305	
306	    return SharedStorageDKDV
307	
308	  @cute.jit
309	  def __call__(
310	    self,
311	    mQ: cute.Tensor,
312	    mK: cute.Tensor,
313	    mV: cute.Tensor,
314	    mdO: cute.Tensor,
315	    mLSE: cute.Tensor,
316	    mdPsum: cute.Tensor,
317	    mdK: cute.Tensor,
318	    mdV: cute.Tensor,
319	    softmax_scale: Float32,
320	    mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
321	    mCuSeqlensK: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
322	    stream: cuda.CUstream = None,
323	  ):
324	    mQ, mK, mV, mdO, mdK, mdV = [
325	      assume_tensor_aligned(t) for t in (mQ, mK, mV, mdO, mdK, mdV)
326	    ]
327	    mLSE, mdPsum = [assume_tensor_aligned(t) for t in (mLSE, mdPsum)]
328	
329	    # Transpose: (b, s, n, h) → (s, h, n, b)
330	    def _qkv_transpose(t):
331	      return layout_utils.select(
332	        t, [1, 3, 2, 0] if cute.rank(t.shape) == 4 else [0, 2, 1]
333	      )
334	
335	    mQ, mK, mV, mdO, mdK, mdV = [
336	      _qkv_transpose(t) for t in (mQ, mK, mV, mdO, mdK, mdV)
337	    ]
338	    # Stats: (b, n, s) → (s, n, b)
339	    LSE_transpose = [2, 1, 0] if cute.rank(mLSE.shape) == 3 else [1, 0]
340	    mLSE = layout_utils.select(mLSE, LSE_transpose)
341	    mdPsum = layout_utils.select(mdPsum, LSE_transpose)
342	
343	    tiled_mma_SdP, tiled_mma_dK, tiled_mma_dV = self._get_tiled_mma()
344	    # num_mma_threads = 256 (WG1+WG2) is set in __init__; do NOT
345	    # overwrite from tiled_mma_SdP.size (= 128 per WG with num_wg_mma=1).
346	    # The per-WG WGMMA thread count is tracked separately if ever needed.
347	    self.num_mma_threads_per_wg = int(tiled_mma_SdP.size)  # = 128
348	    self._setup_attributes()
349	    SharedStorage = self._get_shared_storage_cls()
350	
351	    sK_layout_sel = cute.select(self.sK_persist_layout, mode=[0, 1])
352	    self.tma_copy_bytes = {
353	      name:
354	      cute.size_in_bytes(mX.element_type, cute.select(layout, mode=[0, 1]))
355	      for name, mX, layout in [
356	        ("A", mQ, self.sA_layout),
357	        ("KV", mK, self.sK_persist_layout),
358	      ]
359	    }
360	    self.tma_copy_bytes["LSE"] = self.tile_m * Float32.width // 8
361	    self.tma_copy_bytes["dPsum"] = self.tile_m * Float32.width // 8
362	
363	    sA_layout_sel = cute.select(self.sA_layout, mode=[0, 1])
364	    gmem_tiled_copy_g2s = cpasync.CopyBulkTensorTileG2SOp()
365	    # Q: tile shape (tile_m, d_chunk) = (64, 256)
366	    tma_atom_Q, tma_tensor_Q = cpasync.make_tiled_tma_atom(
367	      gmem_tiled_copy_g2s,
368	      mQ,
369	      sA_layout_sel,
370	      (self.tile_m, self.d_chunk),
371	    )
372	    # dO: tile shape (tile_m, d_chunk) = (64, 256)
373	    tma_atom_dO, tma_tensor_dO = cpasync.make_tiled_tma_atom(
374	      gmem_tiled_copy_g2s,
375	      mdO,
376	      sA_layout_sel,
377	      (self.tile_m, self.d_chunk),
378	    )
379	    # K: tile shape (tile_n, d_chunk) = (64, 256), persistent in SMEM
380	    tma_atom_K, tma_tensor_K = cpasync.make_tiled_tma_atom(
381	      gmem_tiled_copy_g2s,
382	      mK,
383	      sK_layout_sel,
384	      (self.tile_n, self.d_chunk),
385	    )
386	    # V: tile shape (tile_n, d_chunk) = (64, 256), persistent in SMEM
387	    tma_atom_V, tma_tensor_V = cpasync.make_tiled_tma_atom(
388	      gmem_tiled_copy_g2s,
389	      mV,
390	      sK_layout_sel,
391	      (self.tile_n, self.d_chunk),
392	    )
393	    # dK/dV: store atoms + TMA tensors.
394	    self.varlen_k = mCuSeqlensK is not None
395	    self.is_varlen_q = mCuSeqlensQ is not None
396	    gmem_tiled_copy_s2g = cpasync.CopyBulkTensorTileS2GOp()
397	    sB_epi_sel = cute.select(self.sK_persist_layout, mode=[0, 1])
398	    # Varlen K: create ragged TMA tensors for dK/dV output writes
399	    mdK_tma = copy_utils.create_ragged_tensor_for_tma(
400	      mdK, ragged_dim=0, ptr_shift=True
401	    ) if self.varlen_k else mdK
402	    mdV_tma = copy_utils.create_ragged_tensor_for_tma(
403	      mdV, ragged_dim=0, ptr_shift=True
404	    ) if self.varlen_k else mdV
405	    tma_atom_dK, tma_tensor_dK = cpasync.make_tiled_tma_atom(
406	      gmem_tiled_copy_s2g,
407	      mdK_tma,
408	      sB_epi_sel,
409	      (self.tile_n, self.d_chunk),
410	    )
411	    tma_atom_dV, tma_tensor_dV = cpasync.make_tiled_tma_atom(
412	      gmem_tiled_copy_s2g,
413	      mdV_tma,
414	      sB_epi_sel,
415	      (self.tile_n, self.d_chunk),
416	    )
417	
418	    # ── Tile scheduler ──
419	    if const_expr(mCuSeqlensK is not None):
420	      TileScheduler = SingleTileVarlenScheduler
421	    else:
422	      TileScheduler = SingleTileScheduler
423	    num_n_blocks = cute.ceil_div(cute.size(mK.shape[0]), self.tile_n)
424	    num_batch = cute.size(mK.shape[3]) if cute.rank(
425	      mK.shape
426	    ) == 4 else cute.size(mCuSeqlensK.shape[0] - 1)
427	    tile_sched_args = TileSchedulerArguments(
428	      num_n_blocks,  # num_m_blocks (but backward swaps M/N)
429	      cute.size(mK.shape[2]),  # num_heads
430	      num_batch,
431	      1,  # cluster_size
432	      cute.size(mQ.shape[0]),  # seqlen_k → actually seqlen_q for m_block range
433	      mQ.shape[1],  # head_dim_qk
434	      mV.shape[1],  # head_dim_v
435	      total_q=cute.size(mK.shape[0]),
436	      tile_shape_mn=(self.tile_n, self.tile_m),  # swapped for backward
437	      mCuSeqlensQ=mCuSeqlensK,
438	      qhead_per_kvhead_packgqa=1,
439	      element_size=self.dtype.width // 8,
440	      lpt=self.is_causal,
441	    )
442	    tile_sched_params = TileScheduler.to_underlying_arguments(tile_sched_args)
443	    grid_dim = TileScheduler.get_grid_shape(tile_sched_params)
444	
445	    softmax_scale_log2 = softmax_scale * math.log2(math.e)
446	
447	    qhead_per_kvhead_divmod = None
448	    if const_expr(self.qhead_per_kvhead > 1):
449	      qhead_per_kvhead_divmod = FastDivmodDivisor(self.qhead_per_kvhead)
450	
451	    self.kernel(
452	      tma_tensor_Q,
453	      tma_tensor_K,
454	      tma_tensor_V,
455	      tma_tensor_dO,
456	      tma_tensor_dK,
457	      tma_tensor_dV,
458	      tma_atom_Q,
459	      tma_atom_dO,
460	      tma_atom_K,
461	      tma_atom_V,
462	      tma_atom_dK,
463	      tma_atom_dV,
464	      mLSE,
465	      mdPsum,
466	      mCuSeqlensQ,
467	      mCuSeqlensK,
468	      softmax_scale_log2,
469	      softmax_scale,
470	      self.sA_layout,
471	      self.sK_persist_layout,
472	      self.sV_persist_layout,
473	      self.sPdS_layout,
474	      self.sP_fp32_layout,
475	      tiled_mma_SdP,
476	      tiled_mma_dK,
477	      tiled_mma_dV,
478	      tile_sched_params,
479	      TileScheduler,
480	      SharedStorage,
481	      qhead_per_kvhead_divmod,
482	    ).launch(
483	      grid=grid_dim,
484	      block=[self.num_threads, 1, 1],
485	      stream=stream,
486	      min_blocks_per_mp=1,
487	      use_pdl=self.use_pdl,
488	    )
489	
490	  @cute.kernel
491	  def kernel(
492	    self,
493	    mQ: cute.Tensor,
494	    mK: cute.Tensor,
495	    mV: cute.Tensor,
496	    mdO: cute.Tensor,
497	    mdK: cute.Tensor,
498	    mdV: cute.Tensor,
499	    tma_atom_Q: cute.CopyAtom,
500	    tma_atom_dO: cute.CopyAtom,
501	    tma_atom_K: cute.CopyAtom,
502	    tma_atom_V: cute.CopyAtom,
503	    tma_atom_dK: cute.CopyAtom,
504	    tma_atom_dV: cute.CopyAtom,
505	    mLSE: cute.Tensor,
506	    mdPsum: cute.Tensor,
507	    mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor],
508	    mCuSeqlensK: Optional[cute.Tensor],
509	    softmax_scale_log2: Float32,
510	    softmax_scale: Float32,
511	    sA_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
512	    sK_persist_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
513	    sV_persist_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
514	    sPdS_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
515	    sP_fp32_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
516	    tiled_mma_SdP: cute.TiledMma,
517	    tiled_mma_dK: cute.TiledMma,
518	    tiled_mma_dV: cute.TiledMma,
519	    tile_sched_params: ParamsBase,
520	    TileScheduler: cutlass.Constexpr[Callable],
521	    SharedStorage: cutlass.Constexpr[Callable],
522	    qhead_per_kvhead_divmod: Optional[FastDivmodDivisor] = None,
523	  ):
524	    warp_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx())
525	
526	    if warp_idx == 0:
527	      for atom in [
528	        tma_atom_Q, tma_atom_dO, tma_atom_K, tma_atom_V, tma_atom_dK,
529	        tma_atom_dV
530	      ]:
531	        cpasync.prefetch_descriptor(atom)
532	
533	    smem = cutlass.utils.SmemAllocator()
534	    storage = smem.allocate(SharedStorage)
535	
536	    pipeline_producer_group = cutlass.pipeline.CooperativeGroup(
537	      cutlass.pipeline.Agent.Thread
538	    )
539	    # pipeline_K consumed only by WG1, pipeline_V only by WG2.
540	    # Each WG = 4 warps → consumer_group size = 4 (1 elect_one release per warp).
541	    # pipeline_A consumed by both WG1+WG2 (each m_block, real consumer + empty release) → 8 warps.
542	    pipeline_consumer_wg1 = cutlass.pipeline.CooperativeGroup(
543	      cutlass.pipeline.Agent.Thread,
544	      self.num_threads_per_warp_group // cute.arch.WARP_SIZE,  # = 4 warps
545	    )
546	    pipeline_consumer_wg2 = cutlass.pipeline.CooperativeGroup(
547	      cutlass.pipeline.Agent.Thread,
548	      self.num_threads_per_warp_group // cute.arch.WARP_SIZE,  # = 4 warps
549	    )
550	    pipeline_consumer_a = cutlass.pipeline.CooperativeGroup(
551	      cutlass.pipeline.Agent.Thread,
552	      self.num_mma_threads // cute.arch.WARP_SIZE,  # = 8 warps (WG1+WG2)
553	    )
554	    # pipeline_K: K_persist_chunks (=2) chunks of d_chunk=256 each; WG1 only.
555	    pipeline_K = pipeline.PipelineTmaAsync.create(
556	      barrier_storage=storage.mbar_ptr_K.data_ptr(),
557	      num_stages=self.K_persist_chunks,
558	      producer_group=pipeline_producer_group,
559	      consumer_group=pipeline_consumer_wg1,
560	      tx_count=self.tma_copy_bytes["KV"],
561	      defer_sync=True,
562	    )
563	    # pipeline_V: V_persist_chunks (=2) chunks; WG2 only.
564	    pipeline_V = pipeline.PipelineTmaAsync.create(
565	      barrier_storage=storage.mbar_ptr_V.data_ptr(),
566	      num_stages=self.V_persist_chunks,
567	      producer_group=pipeline_producer_group,
568	      consumer_group=pipeline_consumer_wg2,
569	      tx_count=self.tma_copy_bytes["KV"],
570	      defer_sync=True,
571	    )
572	    # pipeline_A: Q/dO streaming. Base tx_count covers sA only; LSE/dPsum
573	    # added via extra_tx_count on the last Q/dO chunk.
574	    pipeline_A = pipeline.PipelineTmaAsync.create(
575	      barrier_storage=storage.mbar_ptr_A.data_ptr(),
576	      num_stages=self.A_stage,
577	      producer_group=pipeline_producer_group,
578	      consumer_group=pipeline_consumer_a,
579	      tx_count=self.tma_copy_bytes["A"],
580	      defer_sync=True,
581	    )
582	
583	    pipeline_init_arrive(cluster_shape_mn=(1, 1), is_relaxed=True)
584	    pipeline_init_wait(cluster_shape_mn=(1, 1))
585	
586	    # sA / sEpi share physical SMEM via union; mainloop uses sA view,
587	    # epilogue uses sEpi view (with explicit fence + Epilogue barrier at transition).
588	    sA = storage.sAEpi.sA.get_tensor(sA_layout.outer, swizzle=sA_layout.inner)
589	    sK_persist = storage.sK_persist.get_tensor(
590	      sK_persist_layout.outer, swizzle=sK_persist_layout.inner
591	    )
592	    sV_persist = storage.sV_persist.get_tensor(
593	      sV_persist_layout.outer, swizzle=sV_persist_layout.inner
594	    )
595	    sP = storage.sP.get_tensor(sPdS_layout.outer, swizzle=sPdS_layout.inner)
596	
597	    # fp32 P buffer: WG1 writes here (alongside bf16 sP); WG2 reads here for dS computation.
598	    sP_fp32 = storage.sP_fp32.get_tensor(
599	      sP_fp32_layout.outer, swizzle=sP_fp32_layout.inner
600	    )
601	    sdS = storage.sdS.get_tensor(sPdS_layout.outer, swizzle=sPdS_layout.inner)
602	
603	    # Single-stage SMEM view for epilogue TMA store (alias of sA's physical slot).
604	    sB_epi_layout_sel = cute.select(sK_persist_layout, mode=[0, 1])
605	    sB_epi = storage.sAEpi.sEpi.get_tensor(
606	      sB_epi_layout_sel.outer, swizzle=sB_epi_layout_sel.inner
607	    )
608	    sLSE = storage.sLSE.get_tensor(
609	      cute.make_layout(
610	        (self.tile_m, self.A_stage),
611	        stride=(1, cute.round_up(self.tile_m, 64)),
612	      )
613	    )
614	    sdPsum = storage.sdPsum.get_tensor(
615	      cute.make_layout(
616	        (self.tile_m, self.A_stage),
617	        stride=(1, cute.round_up(self.tile_m, 64)),
618	      )
619	    )
620	
621	    block_info = BlockInfo(
622	      self.tile_m,
623	      self.tile_n,
624	      self.is_causal,
625	      False,  # is_local
626	    )
627	    SeqlenInfoCls = partial(
628	      SeqlenInfoQK.create,
629	      seqlen_q_static=mQ.shape[0],
630	      seqlen_k_static=mK.shape[0],
631	      mCuSeqlensQ=mCuSeqlensQ,
632	      mCuSeqlensK=mCuSeqlensK,
633	      tile_m=self.tile_m,
634	      tile_n=self.tile_n,
635	    )
636	    TileSchedulerCls = partial(TileScheduler.create, tile_sched_params)
637	
638	    # three-role dispatch — producer WG (warp 0..3) / WG1 (warp 4..7) / WG2 (warp 8..11)
639	    tidx, _, _ = cute.arch.thread_idx()
640	    warp_group_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(
641	      tidx // self.num_threads_per_warp_group
642	    )
643	
644	    if warp_group_idx == 0:
645	      # Producer WG: only warp 0 issues TMA; others idle (held by setmaxregister_decrease).
646	      cute.arch.setmaxregister_decrease(self.num_producer_regs)
647	      if warp_idx == 0:
648	        self.load(
649	          mQ,
650	          mK,
651	          mV,
652	          mdO,
653	          mLSE,
654	          mdPsum,
655	          sA,
656	          sK_persist,
657	          sV_persist,
658	          sLSE,
659	          sdPsum,
660	          tma_atom_Q,
661	          tma_atom_dO,
662	          tma_atom_K,
663	          tma_atom_V,
664	          pipeline_A,
665	          pipeline_K,
666	          pipeline_V,
667	          block_info,
668	          SeqlenInfoCls,
669	          TileSchedulerCls,
670	          qhead_per_kvhead_divmod,
671	        )
672	    elif warp_group_idx == 1:
673	      # WG1: S + P + dV. tidx_in_wg ∈ [0, 128).
674	      cute.arch.setmaxregister_increase(self.num_mma_regs_wg1)
675	      tidx_in_wg = tidx - self.num_threads_per_warp_group
676	      self.mma_wg1(
677	        tiled_mma_SdP,
678	        tiled_mma_dV,
679	        mdV,
680	        sA,
681	        sK_persist,
682	        sP,
683	        sP_fp32,
684	        sLSE,
685	        sB_epi,
686	        pipeline_A,
687	        pipeline_K,
688	        tidx_in_wg,
689	        tma_atom_dV,
690	        softmax_scale_log2,
691	        softmax_scale,
692	        block_info,
693	        SeqlenInfoCls,
694	        TileSchedulerCls,
695	        qhead_per_kvhead_divmod,
696	      )
697	    else:
698	      # WG2: dP + dS + dK. tidx_in_wg ∈ [0, 128).
699	      cute.arch.setmaxregister_increase(self.num_mma_regs_wg2)
700	      tidx_in_wg = tidx - 2 * self.num_threads_per_warp_group
701	      self.mma_wg2(
702	        tiled_mma_SdP,
703	        tiled_mma_dK,
704	        mdK,
705	        sA,
706	        sV_persist,
707	        sP_fp32,
708	        sdS,
709	        sdPsum,
710	        sB_epi,
711	        pipeline_A,
712	        pipeline_V,
713	        tidx_in_wg,
714	        tma_atom_dK,
715	        softmax_scale_log2,
716	        softmax_scale,
717	        block_info,
718	        SeqlenInfoCls,
719	        TileSchedulerCls,
720	        qhead_per_kvhead_divmod,
721	      )
722	
723	  @cute.jit
724	  def load(
725	    self,
726	    mQ: cute.Tensor,
727	    mK: cute.Tensor,
728	    mV: cute.Tensor,
729	    mdO: cute.Tensor,
730	    mLSE: cute.Tensor,
731	    mdPsum: cute.Tensor,
732	    sA: cute.Tensor,
733	    sK_persist: cute.Tensor,
734	    sV_persist: cute.Tensor,
735	    sLSE: cute.Tensor,
736	    sdPsum: cute.Tensor,
737	    tma_atom_Q: cute.CopyAtom,
738	    tma_atom_dO: cute.CopyAtom,
739	    tma_atom_K: cute.CopyAtom,
740	    tma_atom_V: cute.CopyAtom,
741	    pipeline_A: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
742	    pipeline_K: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
743	    pipeline_V: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
744	    block_info: BlockInfo,
745	    SeqlenInfoCls: Callable,
746	    TileSchedulerCls: Callable,
747	    qhead_per_kvhead_divmod: Optional[FastDivmodDivisor] = None,
748	  ):
749	    producer_state_A = cutlass.pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
750	      cutlass.pipeline.PipelineUserType.Producer, self.A_stage
751	    )
752	    producer_state_K = cutlass.pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
753	      cutlass.pipeline.PipelineUserType.Producer, self.K_persist_chunks
754	    )
755	    producer_state_V = cutlass.pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
756	      cutlass.pipeline.PipelineUserType.Producer, self.V_persist_chunks
757	    )
758	
759	    tile_scheduler = TileSchedulerCls()
760	    work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
761	    did_produce_A = Boolean(False)
762	    did_produce_K = Boolean(False)
763	    did_produce_V = Boolean(False)
764	
765	    while work_tile.is_valid_tile:
766	      n_block, head_idx_kv, batch_idx, _ = work_tile.tile_idx
767	      seqlen = SeqlenInfoCls(batch_idx)
768	
769	      # K/V slicing — invariant across Q heads in GQA group
770	      mK_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_K(mK, batch_idx, dim=3)[None, None,
771	                                                           head_idx_kv]
772	      mV_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_K(mV, batch_idx, dim=3)[None, None,
773	                                                           head_idx_kv]
774	
775	      m_block_min, m_block_max = block_info.get_m_block_min_max(seqlen, n_block)
776	      process_tile = const_expr(
777	        not self.is_varlen_q
778	      ) or m_block_min < m_block_max
779	
780	      if process_tile:
781	        # ═══ K/V preload ONCE per work_tile (Cross-pass reuse) ═══
782	        # K (= num_d_inner chunks of d_chunk=256) → sK_persist via pipeline_K
783	        for d_inner in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_d_inner):
784	          gK_d = cute.local_tile(
785	            mK_cur, (self.tile_n, self.d_chunk), (None, d_inner)
786	          )
787	          load_K_d, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
788	            tma_atom_K,
789	            0,
790	            cute.make_layout(1),
791	            gK_d,
792	            sK_persist,
793	          )
794	          pipeline_K.producer_acquire(producer_state_K)
795	          load_K_d(
796	            src_idx=n_block,
797	            dst_idx=d_inner,
798	            tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_K.producer_get_barrier(producer_state_K),
799	          )
800	          pipeline_K.producer_commit(producer_state_K)
801	          did_produce_K = Boolean(True)
802	          producer_state_K.advance()
803	
804	        # V (= num_d_inner chunks) → sV_persist via pipeline_V
805	        for d_inner in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_d_inner):
806	          gV_d = cute.local_tile(
807	            mV_cur, (self.tile_n, self.d_chunk), (None, d_inner)
808	          )
809	          load_V_d, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
810	            tma_atom_V,
811	            0,
812	            cute.make_layout(1),
813	            gV_d,
814	            sV_persist,
815	          )
816	          pipeline_V.producer_acquire(producer_state_V)
817	          load_V_d(
818	            src_idx=n_block,
819	            dst_idx=d_inner,
820	            tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_V.producer_get_barrier(producer_state_V),
821	          )
822	          pipeline_V.producer_commit(producer_state_V)
823	          did_produce_V = Boolean(True)
824	          producer_state_V.advance()
825	
826	        # ── Outer d_pass loop (after K/V preload, inside work_tile) ──
827	        for d_pass in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_d_passes):
828	          # ── GQA Q-head loop: iterate over all Q heads in this KV group ──
829	          for q_head_offset in cutlass.range(self.qhead_per_kvhead, unroll=1):
830	            head_idx_q = head_idx_kv * self.qhead_per_kvhead + q_head_offset
831	
832	            # Q/dO/LSE/dPsum slicing — per Q head
833	            mQ_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mQ, batch_idx, dim=3)[None, None,
834	                                                                 head_idx_q]
835	            mdO_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mdO, batch_idx, dim=3)[None, None,
836	                                                                   head_idx_q]
837	            mLSE_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(
838	              mLSE, batch_idx, dim=2, padded=True
839	            )[None, head_idx_q]
840	            mdPsum_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(
841	              mdPsum, batch_idx, dim=2, padded=True
842	            )[None, head_idx_q]
843	
844	            gLSE = cute.local_tile(mLSE_cur, (self.tile_m, ), (None, ))
845	            gdPsum = cute.local_tile(mdPsum_cur, (self.tile_m, ), (None, ))
846	            if const_expr(self.use_pdl):
847	              cute.arch.griddepcontrol_wait()
848	            load_LSE = copy_utils.cpasync_bulk_get_copy_fn(gLSE, sLSE)
849	            load_dPsum = copy_utils.cpasync_bulk_get_copy_fn(gdPsum, sdPsum)
850	
851	            for m_block in cutlass.range(m_block_min, m_block_max, unroll=1):
852	              # ═══ Phase 1: Q0..Q{num_d_inner-1} → sA. LSE piggyback on last Q. ═══
853	              for d_inner in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_d_inner):
854	                gQ_d = cute.local_tile(
855	                  mQ_cur, (self.tile_m, self.d_chunk), (None, d_inner)
856	                )
857	                load_Q_d, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
858	                  tma_atom_Q,
859	                  0,
860	                  cute.make_layout(1),
861	                  gQ_d,
862	                  sA,
863	                )
864	                if cutlass.const_expr(d_inner == self.num_d_inner - 1):
865	                  pipeline_A.producer_acquire(
866	                    producer_state_A,
867	                    extra_tx_count=self.tma_copy_bytes["LSE"],
868	                  )
869	                else:
870	                  pipeline_A.producer_acquire(producer_state_A)
871	                load_Q_d(
872	                  src_idx=m_block,
873	                  dst_idx=producer_state_A.index,
874	                  tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_A.producer_get_barrier(producer_state_A),
875	                )
876	                if cutlass.const_expr(d_inner == self.num_d_inner - 1):
877	                  load_LSE(
878	                    src_idx=m_block,
879	                    dst_idx=producer_state_A.index,
880	                    tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_A.
881	                    producer_get_barrier(producer_state_A),
882	                  )
883	                pipeline_A.producer_commit(producer_state_A)
884	                did_produce_A = Boolean(True)
885	                producer_state_A.advance()
886	
887	              # ═══ Phase 3: dO0..dO{num_d_inner-1} → sA. dPsum on last dO. ═══
888	              for d_inner in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_d_inner):
889	                gdO_d = cute.local_tile(
890	                  mdO_cur, (self.tile_m, self.d_chunk), (None, d_inner)
891	                )
892	                load_dO_d, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
893	                  tma_atom_dO,
894	                  0,
895	                  cute.make_layout(1),
896	                  gdO_d,
897	                  sA,
898	                )
899	                if cutlass.const_expr(d_inner == self.num_d_inner - 1):
900	                  pipeline_A.producer_acquire(
901	                    producer_state_A,
902	                    extra_tx_count=self.tma_copy_bytes["dPsum"],
903	                  )
904	                else:
905	                  pipeline_A.producer_acquire(producer_state_A)
906	                load_dO_d(
907	                  src_idx=m_block,
908	                  dst_idx=producer_state_A.index,
909	                  tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_A.producer_get_barrier(producer_state_A),
910	                )
911	                if cutlass.const_expr(d_inner == self.num_d_inner - 1):
912	                  load_dPsum(
913	                    src_idx=m_block,
914	                    dst_idx=producer_state_A.index,
915	                    tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_A.
916	                    producer_get_barrier(producer_state_A),
917	                  )
918	                pipeline_A.producer_commit(producer_state_A)
919	                did_produce_A = Boolean(True)
920	                producer_state_A.advance()
921	
922	              # ═══ Phase 5: dO_d_pass → sA (for WG1 dV GEMM) ═══
923	              gdO_pass = cute.local_tile(
924	                mdO_cur, (self.tile_m, self.d_chunk), (None, d_pass)
925	              )
926	              load_dO_pass, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
927	                tma_atom_dO,
928	                0,
929	                cute.make_layout(1),
930	                gdO_pass,
931	                sA,
932	              )
933	              pipeline_A.producer_acquire(producer_state_A)
934	              load_dO_pass(
935	                src_idx=m_block,
936	                dst_idx=producer_state_A.index,
937	                tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_A.producer_get_barrier(producer_state_A),
938	              )
939	              pipeline_A.producer_commit(producer_state_A)
940	              did_produce_A = Boolean(True)
941	              producer_state_A.advance()
942	
943	              # ═══ Phase 6: Q_d_pass → sA (for WG2 dK GEMM) ═══
944	              gQ_pass = cute.local_tile(
945	                mQ_cur, (self.tile_m, self.d_chunk), (None, d_pass)
946	              )
947	              load_Q_pass, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
948	                tma_atom_Q,
949	                0,
950	                cute.make_layout(1),
951	                gQ_pass,
952	                sA,
953	              )
954	              pipeline_A.producer_acquire(producer_state_A)
955	              load_Q_pass(
956	                src_idx=m_block,
957	                dst_idx=producer_state_A.index,
958	                tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_A.producer_get_barrier(producer_state_A),
959	              )
960	              pipeline_A.producer_commit(producer_state_A)
961	              did_produce_A = Boolean(True)
962	              producer_state_A.advance()
963	
964	          # WarpSchedulerWG1 barrier per d_pass
965	          # (NOT work_tile end). sA ↔ sEpi union forces producer to wait
966	          # until consumer epilogue done before loading next d_pass into sA.
967	          cute.arch.barrier(
968	            barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.WarpSchedulerWG1),
969	            number_of_threads=self.num_producer_threads + self.num_mma_threads,
970	          )
971	
972	      tile_scheduler.advance_to_next_work()
973	      work_tile = tile_scheduler.get_current_work()
974	
975	    if did_produce_A:
976	      pipeline_A.producer_tail(producer_state_A)
977	    if did_produce_K:
978	      pipeline_K.producer_tail(producer_state_K)
979	    if did_produce_V:
980	      pipeline_V.producer_tail(producer_state_V)
981	
982	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
983	  # WG1 = S (P1) + softmax→sP→arrive PFull (P2) + dV (P5)
984	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
985	  @cute.jit
986	  def mma_wg1(
987	    self,
988	    tiled_mma_SdP: cute.TiledMma,
989	    tiled_mma_dV: cute.TiledMma,
990	    mdV: cute.Tensor,
991	    sA: cute.Tensor,
992	    sK_persist: cute.Tensor,
993	    sP: cute.Tensor,
994	    sP_fp32: cute.Tensor,  # fp32 P buffer for WG2 to read (no precision loss)
995	    sLSE: cute.Tensor,
996	    sB_epi: cute.Tensor,
997	    pipeline_A: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
998	    pipeline_K: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
999	    tidx: Int32,
1000	    tma_atom_dV: cute.CopyAtom,
1001	    softmax_scale_log2: Float32,
1002	    softmax_scale: Float32,
1003	    block_info: BlockInfo,
1004	    SeqlenInfoCls: Callable,
1005	    TileSchedulerCls: Callable,
1006	    qhead_per_kvhead_divmod: Optional[FastDivmodDivisor] = None,
1007	  ):
1008	    thr_mma_SdP = tiled_mma_SdP.get_slice(tidx)
1009	    wg_mma_SdP = tiled_mma_SdP.get_slice(0)
1010	    wg_mma_dV = tiled_mma_dV.get_slice(0)
1011	
1012	    # ── SdP fragments (WG1 needs only K, not V) ──
1013	    shape_mnk_SdP = (self.tile_m, self.tile_n, self.d_chunk)
1014	    _, tSrA, tSrB_K = sm90_utils.partition_fragment_ABC(
1015	      wg_mma_SdP, shape_mnk_SdP, sA, sK_persist, swap_AB=False
1016	    )
1017	
1018	    # ── dV GEMM fragments: dV = P^T @ dO_d_pass ──
1019	    sPt = layout_utils.transpose_view(sP)
1020	    sAt = layout_utils.transpose_view(sA)
1021	    shape_mnk_dV = (self.tile_n, self.d_chunk, self.tile_m)
1022	    acc_dV, tdVrPt, tdVrdOt = sm90_utils.partition_fragment_ABC(
1023	      wg_mma_dV, shape_mnk_dV, sPt, sAt, swap_AB=False
1024	    )
1025	    mma_dV_fn = partial(
1026	      gemm_w_idx, tiled_mma_dV, acc_dV, tdVrPt, tdVrdOt, swap_AB=False
1027	    )
1028	
1029	    # ── P R2S copies: ──
1030	    #   (a) bf16 sP for WG1 dV WGMMA SS-mode (must be fp16/bf16 for WGMMA A operand)
1031	    copy_P_r2s, _, _ = copy_utils.get_smem_store_C(
1032	      tiled_mma_SdP,
1033	      sP,
1034	      tidx,
1035	      transpose=False,
1036	      position_independent=True,
1037	    )
1038	    #   (b) fp32 sP store via get_smem_store_C → CopyUniversalOp atom in C-operand
1039	    #       layout (matches partition_C(sP_fp32) addressing)
1040	    copy_P_fp32_r2s, _, _ = copy_utils.get_smem_store_C(
1041	      tiled_mma_SdP,
1042	      sP_fp32,
1043	      tidx,
1044	      transpose=False,
1045	      position_independent=False,
1046	    )
1047	
1048	    # ── LSE partitioning (per-thread row mapping via MMA C partition) ──
1049	    tLSEsLSE = layout_utils.mma_partition_C_vec(
1050	      sLSE, thr_mma_SdP, expand_shape=self.tile_n, is_colvec=True
1051	    )
1052	
1053	    consumer_state_A = cutlass.pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
1054	      cutlass.pipeline.PipelineUserType.Consumer, self.A_stage
1055	    )
1056	    consumer_state_K = cutlass.pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
1057	      cutlass.pipeline.PipelineUserType.Consumer, self.K_persist_chunks
1058	    )
1059	
1060	    tile_scheduler = TileSchedulerCls()
1061	    work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
1062	
1063	    while work_tile.is_valid_tile:
1064	      n_block, head_idx_kv, batch_idx, _ = work_tile.tile_idx
1065	      seqlen = SeqlenInfoCls(batch_idx)
1066	      m_block_min, m_block_max = block_info.get_m_block_min_max(seqlen, n_block)
1067	      process_tile = const_expr(
1068	        not self.is_varlen_q
1069	      ) or m_block_min < m_block_max
1070	
1071	      if process_tile:
1072	        # K preload wait & release ONCE per work_tile (Cross-pass reuse)
1073	        for _k in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.K_persist_chunks):
1074	          pipeline_K.consumer_wait(
1075	            consumer_state_K, pipeline_K.consumer_try_wait(consumer_state_K)
1076	          )
1077	          with cute.arch.elect_one():
1078	            pipeline_K.consumer_release(consumer_state_K)
1079	          consumer_state_K.advance()
1080	
1081	        for d_pass in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_d_passes):
1082	          dKV_accumulate = Boolean(False)
1083	
1084	          for q_head_offset in cutlass.range(self.qhead_per_kvhead, unroll=1):
1085	            head_idx_q = head_idx_kv * self.qhead_per_kvhead + q_head_offset
1086	
1087	            mask = AttentionMask(self.tile_m, self.tile_n, seqlen)
1088	            mask_fn = partial(
1089	              mask.apply_mask,
1090	              batch_idx=batch_idx,
1091	              head_idx=head_idx_q,
1092	              n_block=n_block,
1093	              thr_mma=thr_mma_SdP,
1094	              mask_seqlen=True,
1095	              mask_causal=self.is_causal,
1096	            )
1097	
1098	            for m_block in cutlass.range(m_block_min, m_block_max, unroll=1):
1099	              consumer_state_A = self._mma_wg1_one_m_block(
1100	                m_block,
1101	                consumer_state_A,
1102	                tiled_mma_SdP,
1103	                tSrA,
1104	                tSrB_K,
1105	                shape_mnk_SdP,
1106	                mma_dV_fn,
1107	                copy_P_r2s,
1108	                copy_P_fp32_r2s,
1109	                pipeline_A,
1110	                tLSEsLSE,
1111	                softmax_scale_log2,
1112	                mask_fn,
1113	                dKV_accumulate=dKV_accumulate,
1114	              )
1115	              dKV_accumulate = Boolean(True)
1116	
1117	          # Per-d_pass epilogue: WG1 writes dV[:, d_pass*d_chunk:(d_pass+1)*d_chunk]
1118	          self.epilogue_dV_slice(
1119	            acc_dV,
1120	            mdV,
1121	            sB_epi,
1122	            seqlen,
1123	            tma_atom_dV,
1124	            tiled_mma_dV,
1125	            tidx,
1126	            n_block,
1127	            head_idx_kv,
1128	            batch_idx,
1129	            d_pass,
1130	          )
1131	
1132	          # Per-d_pass WSWG1 sync (288): producer waits before loading
1133	          # next d_pass's pipeline_A items into sA (union with sEpi).
1134	          cute.arch.barrier(
1135	            barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.WarpSchedulerWG1),
1136	            number_of_threads=self.num_producer_threads + self.num_mma_threads,
1137	          )
1138	
1139	      tile_scheduler.advance_to_next_work()
1140	      work_tile = tile_scheduler.get_current_work()
1141	
1142	    warp_idx_final = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx())
1143	    if warp_idx_final == 4:  # WG1's TMA-issuing warp (dV stores)
1144	      # Full wait (no `read=True`): wait for GMEM visibility, not just SMEM-read.
1145	      cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_wait_group(0)
1146	
1147	  @cute.jit
1148	  def _mma_wg1_one_m_block(
1149	    self,
1150	    m_block: Int32,
1151	    consumer_state_A: cutlass.pipeline.PipelineState,
1152	    tiled_mma_SdP: cute.TiledMma,
1153	    tSrA: cute.Tensor,
1154	    tSrB_K: cute.Tensor,
1155	    shape_mnk_SdP: cute.Shape,
1156	    mma_dV_fn: Callable,
1157	    copy_P_r2s: Callable,
1158	    copy_P_fp32_r2s:
1159	    Callable,  # fp32 sP_fp32 store via CopyUniversalOp atom in C-operand layout
1160	    pipeline_A: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1161	    tLSEsLSE: cute.Tensor,
1162	    softmax_scale_log2: Float32,
1163	    mask_fn: Callable,
1164	    dKV_accumulate: Boolean = True,
1165	  ):
1166	    p_stage = Int32(0)  # sP single-buffered
1167	
1168	    # ═══ Phase 1: S = ΣQ_d @ K_d^T (num_d_inner WGMMA, real consume Q) ═══
1169	    acc_S = cute.make_rmem_tensor(
1170	      tiled_mma_SdP.partition_shape_C(shape_mnk_SdP[:2]), Float32
1171	    )
1172	    for d_inner in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_d_inner):
1173	      pipeline_A.consumer_wait(
1174	        consumer_state_A, pipeline_A.consumer_try_wait(consumer_state_A)
1175	      )
1176	      gemm_w_idx(
1177	        tiled_mma_SdP,
1178	        acc_S,
1179	        tSrA,
1180	        tSrB_K,
1181	        zero_init=(d_inner == 0),
1182	        A_idx=consumer_state_A.index,
1183	        B_idx=d_inner,
1184	        wg_wait=0,
1185	      )
1186	      if cutlass.const_expr(d_inner == self.num_d_inner - 1):
1187	        # LSE piggybacked on last Q chunk — read before release.
1188	        tLSErLSE = copy_utils.load_s2r(tLSEsLSE[None, consumer_state_A.index])
1189	      with cute.arch.elect_one():
1190	        pipeline_A.consumer_release(consumer_state_A)
1191	      consumer_state_A.advance()
1192	
1193	    # ═══ Empty release: dO0..dO_{num_d_inner-1} (consumed by WG2) ═══
1194	    for _ in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_d_inner):
1195	      pipeline_A.consumer_wait(
1196	        consumer_state_A, pipeline_A.consumer_try_wait(consumer_state_A)
1197	      )
1198	      with cute.arch.elect_one():
1199	        pipeline_A.consumer_release(consumer_state_A)
1200	      consumer_state_A.advance()
1201	
1202	    # ═══ Phase 2: mask + softmax → P (fp32 in rmem, in-place on acc_S) ═══
1203	    mask_fn(acc_S, m_block=m_block)
1204	    acc_S_mn = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(acc_S, transpose=False)
1205	    for r in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(acc_S_mn, mode=[0])):
1206	      lse_val = tLSErLSE[r]
1207	      for c in cutlass.range(cute.size(acc_S_mn, mode=[1]), unroll_full=True):
1208	        acc_S_mn[r, c] = cute.math.exp2(
1209	          acc_S_mn[r, c] * softmax_scale_log2 - lse_val, fastmath=True
1210	        )
1211	
1212	    # bf16 P (frgA layout) for STSM into sP (WG1's dV WGMMA A operand).
1213	    tdVrP = utils.cvt_f16(layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_frgA(acc_S), self.dtype)
1214	
1215	    # ═══ Cross-WG handshake: wait WG2 done with prior sP, then write both sP buffers ═══
1216	    cute.arch.barrier(
1217	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.PEmpty),
1218	      number_of_threads=self.num_mma_threads,  # 256
1219	    )
1220	    # (a) STSM bf16 P → sP (for WG1's own dV WGMMA SS-mode read)
1221	    copy_P_r2s(tdVrP, dst_idx=p_stage)
1222	    # (b) Universal-op store fp32 acc_S → sP_fp32 in C-operand layout
1223	    # (bf16-roundtrip-free P channel for WG2 to read in P4).
1224	    copy_P_fp32_r2s(acc_S, dst_idx=p_stage)
1225	    cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()  # orders both STSM and direct stores
1226	    cute.arch.sync_warp()
1227	    cute.arch.barrier_arrive(
1228	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.PFull),
1229	      number_of_threads=self.num_mma_threads,
1230	    )
1231	
1232	    # ═══ Phase 5: dV += P^T @ dO_d_pass (sP self-read via SMEM) ═══
1233	    pipeline_A.consumer_wait(
1234	      consumer_state_A, pipeline_A.consumer_try_wait(consumer_state_A)
1235	    )
1236	    smem_idx_dO_pass = consumer_state_A.index
1237	    mma_dV_fn(
1238	      A_idx=p_stage,
1239	      B_idx=smem_idx_dO_pass,
1240	      zero_init=not dKV_accumulate,
1241	      wg_wait=0,
1242	    )
1243	    with cute.arch.elect_one():
1244	      pipeline_A.consumer_release(consumer_state_A)
1245	    consumer_state_A.advance()
1246	
1247	    # ═══ Empty release Q_d_pass (consumed by WG2 P6) ═══
1248	    pipeline_A.consumer_wait(
1249	      consumer_state_A, pipeline_A.consumer_try_wait(consumer_state_A)
1250	    )
1251	    with cute.arch.elect_one():
1252	      pipeline_A.consumer_release(consumer_state_A)
1253	    consumer_state_A.advance()
1254	
1255	    return consumer_state_A
1256	
1257	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
1258	  # WG2 = dP (P3) + sync PFull → dS → sdS → arrive PEmpty (P4) + dK (P6)
1259	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
1260	  @cute.jit
1261	  def mma_wg2(
1262	    self,
1263	    tiled_mma_SdP: cute.TiledMma,
1264	    tiled_mma_dK: cute.TiledMma,
1265	    mdK: cute.Tensor,
1266	    sA: cute.Tensor,
1267	    sV_persist: cute.Tensor,
1268	    sP_fp32: cute.
1269	    Tensor,  # fp32 P buffer (replaces bf16 sP; WG2 no longer needs bf16)
1270	    sdS: cute.Tensor,
1271	    sdPsum: cute.Tensor,
1272	    sB_epi: cute.Tensor,
1273	    pipeline_A: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1274	    pipeline_V: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1275	    tidx: Int32,
1276	    tma_atom_dK: cute.CopyAtom,
1277	    softmax_scale_log2: Float32,
1278	    softmax_scale: Float32,
1279	    block_info: BlockInfo,
1280	    SeqlenInfoCls: Callable,
1281	    TileSchedulerCls: Callable,
1282	    qhead_per_kvhead_divmod: Optional[FastDivmodDivisor] = None,
1283	  ):
1284	    thr_mma_SdP = tiled_mma_SdP.get_slice(tidx)
1285	    wg_mma_SdP = tiled_mma_SdP.get_slice(0)
1286	    wg_mma_dK = tiled_mma_dK.get_slice(0)
1287	
1288	    # ── SdP fragments (WG2 needs only V, not K) ──
1289	    shape_mnk_SdP = (self.tile_m, self.tile_n, self.d_chunk)
1290	    _, tSrA, tSrB_V = sm90_utils.partition_fragment_ABC(
1291	      wg_mma_SdP, shape_mnk_SdP, sA, sV_persist, swap_AB=False
1292	    )
1293	
1294	    # ── dK GEMM fragments: dK = dS^T @ Q_d_pass ──
1295	    sdSt = layout_utils.transpose_view(sdS)
1296	    sAt = layout_utils.transpose_view(sA)
1297	    shape_mnk_dK = (self.tile_n, self.d_chunk, self.tile_m)
1298	    acc_dK, tdKrdSt, tdKrQt = sm90_utils.partition_fragment_ABC(
1299	      wg_mma_dK, shape_mnk_dK, sdSt, sAt, swap_AB=False
1300	    )
1301	    mma_dK_fn = partial(
1302	      gemm_w_idx, tiled_mma_dK, acc_dK, tdKrdSt, tdKrQt, swap_AB=False
1303	    )
1304	
1305	    # ── dS R2S copy (WG2-internal: STSM rmem dS → sdS[0]) ──
1306	    copy_dS_r2s, _, _ = copy_utils.get_smem_store_C(
1307	      tiled_mma_SdP,
1308	      sdS,
1309	      tidx,
1310	      transpose=False,
1311	      position_independent=True,
1312	    )
1313	
1314	    # ── sP_fp32 s2r partition (WG2 reads fp32 P from sP_fp32, NOT bf16 sP).
1315	    tSsP_fp32_partition = thr_mma_SdP.partition_C(
1316	      sP_fp32
1317	    )  # ((atom), MMA_M, MMA_N, stage)
1318	
1319	    # ── dPsum partitioning (per-thread row mapping) ──
1320	    tLSEsdPsum = layout_utils.mma_partition_C_vec(
1321	      sdPsum, thr_mma_SdP, expand_shape=self.tile_n, is_colvec=True
1322	    )
1323	
1324	    #   pre-arrive PEmpty so WG1's first barrier(PEmpty, 256) finds
1325	    #   128 arrivals from WG2 and only waits for WG1's own 128.
1326	    cute.arch.barrier_arrive(
1327	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.PEmpty),
1328	      number_of_threads=self.num_mma_threads,  # 256
1329	    )
1330	
1331	    consumer_state_A = cutlass.pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
1332	      cutlass.pipeline.PipelineUserType.Consumer, self.A_stage
1333	    )
1334	    consumer_state_V = cutlass.pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
1335	      cutlass.pipeline.PipelineUserType.Consumer, self.V_persist_chunks
1336	    )
1337	
1338	    tile_scheduler = TileSchedulerCls()
1339	    work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
1340	
1341	    while work_tile.is_valid_tile:
1342	      n_block, head_idx_kv, batch_idx, _ = work_tile.tile_idx
1343	      seqlen = SeqlenInfoCls(batch_idx)
1344	      m_block_min, m_block_max = block_info.get_m_block_min_max(seqlen, n_block)
1345	      process_tile = const_expr(
1346	        not self.is_varlen_q
1347	      ) or m_block_min < m_block_max
1348	
1349	      if process_tile:
1350	        # ★ V preload wait & release ONCE per work_tile (跨 d_pass 复用)
1351	        for _v in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.V_persist_chunks):
1352	          pipeline_V.consumer_wait(
1353	            consumer_state_V, pipeline_V.consumer_try_wait(consumer_state_V)
1354	          )
1355	          with cute.arch.elect_one():
1356	            pipeline_V.consumer_release(consumer_state_V)
1357	          consumer_state_V.advance()
1358	
1359	        # ★ V tail zero (WG2 internal, 128 thread; ONCE per work_tile)
1360	        self.zero_v_tail_smem_wg2(
1361	          sV_persist=sV_persist, seqlen=seqlen, n_block=n_block, tidx=tidx
1362	        )
1363	
1364	        for d_pass in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_d_passes):
1365	          dKV_accumulate = Boolean(False)
1366	
1367	          for q_head_offset in cutlass.range(self.qhead_per_kvhead, unroll=1):
1368	            head_idx_q = head_idx_kv * self.qhead_per_kvhead + q_head_offset
1369	
1370	            mask = AttentionMask(self.tile_m, self.tile_n, seqlen)
1371	            mask_fn = partial(
1372	              mask.apply_mask,
1373	              batch_idx=batch_idx,
1374	              head_idx=head_idx_q,
1375	              n_block=n_block,
1376	              thr_mma=thr_mma_SdP,
1377	              mask_seqlen=True,
1378	              mask_causal=self.is_causal,
1379	            )
1380	
1381	            for m_block in cutlass.range(m_block_min, m_block_max, unroll=1):
1382	              consumer_state_A = self._mma_wg2_one_m_block(
1383	                m_block,
1384	                consumer_state_A,
1385	                tiled_mma_SdP,
1386	                tSrA,
1387	                tSrB_V,
1388	                shape_mnk_SdP,
1389	                mma_dK_fn,
1390	                copy_dS_r2s,
1391	                tSsP_fp32_partition,
1392	                pipeline_A,
1393	                tLSEsdPsum,
1394	                softmax_scale,
1395	                mask_fn,
1396	                dKV_accumulate=dKV_accumulate,
1397	              )
1398	              dKV_accumulate = Boolean(True)
1399	
1400	          # Per-d_pass epilogue: WG2 writes dK[:, d_pass*d_chunk:(d_pass+1)*d_chunk]
1401	          # (serialized with WG1 dV via Epilogue NamedBarrier inside epi function).
1402	          self.epilogue_dK_slice(
1403	            acc_dK,
1404	            mdK,
1405	            sB_epi,
1406	            seqlen,
1407	            tma_atom_dK,
1408	            tiled_mma_dK,
1409	            tidx,
1410	            n_block,
1411	            head_idx_kv,
1412	            batch_idx,
1413	            d_pass,
1414	          )
1415	
1416	          # ★ Per-d_pass WSWG1 sync (288): mirror mma_wg1; producer waits.
1417	          cute.arch.barrier(
1418	            barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.WarpSchedulerWG1),
1419	            number_of_threads=self.num_producer_threads + self.num_mma_threads,
1420	          )
1421	
1422	      tile_scheduler.advance_to_next_work()
1423	      work_tile = tile_scheduler.get_current_work()
1424	
1425	    warp_idx_final = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx())
1426	    if warp_idx_final == 8:  # WG2's TMA-issuing warp (dK stores)
1427	      cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_wait_group(0)
1428	
1429	  @cute.jit
1430	  def _mma_wg2_one_m_block(
1431	    self,
1432	    m_block: Int32,
1433	    consumer_state_A: cutlass.pipeline.PipelineState,
1434	    tiled_mma_SdP: cute.TiledMma,
1435	    tSrA: cute.Tensor,
1436	    tSrB_V: cute.Tensor,
1437	    shape_mnk_SdP: cute.Shape,
1438	    mma_dK_fn: Callable,
1439	    copy_dS_r2s: Callable,
1440	    tSsP_fp32_partition: cute.
1441	    Tensor,  # thr_mma_SdP.partition_C(sP_fp32) — fp32 per-thread C-acc view
1442	    pipeline_A: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1443	    tLSEsdPsum: cute.Tensor,
1444	    softmax_scale: Float32,
1445	    mask_fn: Callable,
1446	    dKV_accumulate: Boolean = True,
1447	  ):
1448	    p_stage = Int32(0)  # sP/sdS single-buffered
1449	
1450	    # ═══ Empty release: Q0..Q_{num_d_inner-1} (consumed by WG1) ═══
1451	    for _ in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_d_inner):
1452	      pipeline_A.consumer_wait(
1453	        consumer_state_A, pipeline_A.consumer_try_wait(consumer_state_A)
1454	      )
1455	      with cute.arch.elect_one():
1456	        pipeline_A.consumer_release(consumer_state_A)
1457	      consumer_state_A.advance()
1458	
1459	    # ═══ Phase 3: dP = Σ dO_d @ V_d^T (num_d_inner WGMMA, real consume dO) ═══
1460	    acc_dP = cute.make_rmem_tensor(
1461	      tiled_mma_SdP.partition_shape_C(shape_mnk_SdP[:2]), Float32
1462	    )
1463	    for d_inner in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_d_inner):
1464	      pipeline_A.consumer_wait(
1465	        consumer_state_A, pipeline_A.consumer_try_wait(consumer_state_A)
1466	      )
1467	      gemm_w_idx(
1468	        tiled_mma_SdP,
1469	        acc_dP,
1470	        tSrA,
1471	        tSrB_V,
1472	        zero_init=(d_inner == 0),
1473	        A_idx=consumer_state_A.index,
1474	        B_idx=d_inner,
1475	        wg_wait=0,
1476	      )
1477	      if cutlass.const_expr(d_inner == self.num_d_inner - 1):
1478	        # dPsum piggybacked on last dO chunk — read before release.
1479	        tLSErdPsum = copy_utils.load_s2r(
1480	          tLSEsdPsum[None, consumer_state_A.index]
1481	        )
1482	      with cute.arch.elect_one():
1483	        pipeline_A.consumer_release(consumer_state_A)
1484	      consumer_state_A.advance()
1485	
1486	    # ═══ Phase 4: barrier(PFull) → load fp32 P → dS compute ═══
1487	    cute.arch.barrier(
1488	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.PFull),
1489	      number_of_threads=self.num_mma_threads,  # 256
1490	    )
1491	    # Read fp32 P from sP_fp32 — no fp32→bf16→fp32 precision loss.
1492	    tdSrP_fp32 = copy_utils.load_s2r(
1493	      tSsP_fp32_partition[None, None, None, p_stage]
1494	    )
1495	
1496	    # dS = P * (dP - dPsum) * scale — acc_dP from sync WGMMAs above, P from LDS.
1497	    tdSrP_mn = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(tdSrP_fp32, transpose=False)
1498	    acc_dP_mn = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(acc_dP, transpose=False)
1499	    for r in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(acc_dP_mn, mode=[0])):
1500	      dpsum_val = tLSErdPsum[r]
1501	      for c in cutlass.range(cute.size(acc_dP_mn, mode=[1]), unroll_full=True):
1502	        acc_dP_mn[
1503	          r,
1504	          c] = (tdSrP_mn[r, c] * (acc_dP_mn[r, c] - dpsum_val) * softmax_scale)
1505	
1506	    # Convert dS (now in acc_dP rmem, fp32) → fp16 frgA → STSM into sdS[0].
1507	    tdKrdS = utils.cvt_f16(layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_frgA(acc_dP), self.dtype)
1508	    copy_dS_r2s(tdKrdS, dst_idx=p_stage)
1509	    cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1510	    # WG2-internal sync (128-thread): ensure all WG2 STSM commits before P6 reads sdS.
1511	    cute.arch.barrier(
1512	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.dSLocal),
1513	      number_of_threads=self.num_threads_per_warp_group,  # 128 (WG2 only)
1514	    )
1515	    # Tell WG1 the sP slot is empty (P5 inside WG1 already self-read it).
1516	    cute.arch.barrier_arrive(
1517	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.PEmpty),
1518	      number_of_threads=self.num_mma_threads,
1519	    )
1520	
1521	    # ═══ Empty release: dO_d_pass (consumed by WG1 P5) ═══
1522	    pipeline_A.consumer_wait(
1523	      consumer_state_A, pipeline_A.consumer_try_wait(consumer_state_A)
1524	    )
1525	    with cute.arch.elect_one():
1526	      pipeline_A.consumer_release(consumer_state_A)
1527	    consumer_state_A.advance()
1528	
1529	    # ═══ Phase 6: dK += dS^T @ Q_d_pass ═══
1530	    pipeline_A.consumer_wait(
1531	      consumer_state_A, pipeline_A.consumer_try_wait(consumer_state_A)
1532	    )
1533	    smem_idx_Q_pass = consumer_state_A.index
1534	    mma_dK_fn(
1535	      A_idx=p_stage,
1536	      B_idx=smem_idx_Q_pass,
1537	      zero_init=not dKV_accumulate,
1538	      wg_wait=0,
1539	    )
1540	    with cute.arch.elect_one():
1541	      pipeline_A.consumer_release(consumer_state_A)
1542	    consumer_state_A.advance()
1543	
1544	    return consumer_state_A
1545	
1546	  @cute.jit
1547	  def zero_v_tail_smem_wg2(
1548	    self,
1549	    sV_persist: cute.Tensor,
1550	    seqlen: SeqlenInfoQK,
1551	    n_block: Int32,
1552	    tidx: Int32,  # WG-local tidx ∈ [0, 128)
1553	  ):
1554	    valid_rows = seqlen.seqlen_k - n_block * self.tile_n
1555	    if valid_rows < self.tile_n:
1556	      tail_elems = (self.tile_n - valid_rows) * self.d_chunk
1557	      for d_inner in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_d_inner):
1558	        for linear_idx in cutlass.range(
1559	          tidx, tail_elems, self.num_threads_per_warp_group, unroll=1
1560	        ):
1561	          row_offset = linear_idx // self.d_chunk
1562	          col = linear_idx - row_offset * self.d_chunk
1563	          sV_persist[valid_rows + row_offset, col,
1564	                     d_inner] = sV_persist.element_type(0.0)
1565	      cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1566	      cute.arch.barrier(
1567	        barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.VTailZero),
1568	        number_of_threads=self.num_threads_per_warp_group,  # 128 (WG2 only)
1569	      )
1570	
1571	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
1572	  # Epilogue split into dV (WG1) and dK (WG2), serialized via
1573	  # Epilogue NamedBarrier 3-step handshake (SYNC A → SYNC B → SYNC C).
1574	  # Shared sEpi physical SMEM is unioned with sA; lifetime switch is
1575	  # protected by entry SYNC A (256-thread) after fence_view_async_shared.
1576	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
1577	  @cute.jit
1578	  def epilogue_dV_slice(
1579	    self,
1580	    acc_dV: cute.Tensor,
1581	    mdV: cute.Tensor,
1582	    sEpi: cute.Tensor,
1583	    seqlen: SeqlenInfoQK,
1584	    tma_atom_dV: cute.CopyAtom,
1585	    tiled_mma_dV: cute.TiledMma,
1586	    tidx: Int32,  # WG-local ∈ [0, 128)
1587	    n_block: Int32,
1588	    head_idx: Int32,
1589	    batch_idx: Int32,
1590	    d_pass: Int32,
1591	  ):
1592	    """Called by WG1 only. Writes dV[:, d_pass*d_chunk:(d_pass+1)*d_chunk]."""
1593	    warp_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx())
1594	    # WG1 occupies warp 4..7 (CTA-absolute). warp_idx == 4 issues the TMA store.
1595	
1596	    # Build dV gmem slice for this (n_block, d_pass).
1597	    mdV_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_K(
1598	      mdV, batch_idx, dim=3, ragged=self.varlen_k
1599	    )[None, None, head_idx]
1600	    gdV = cute.local_tile(
1601	      mdV_cur, (self.tile_n, self.d_chunk), (n_block, d_pass)
1602	    )
1603	    store_dV, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
1604	      tma_atom_dV, 0, cute.make_layout(1), sEpi, gdV, single_stage=True
1605	    )
1606	    copy_dV_r2s, _, _ = copy_utils.get_smem_store_C(
1607	      tiled_mma_dV,
1608	      sEpi,
1609	      tidx,
1610	      transpose=False,
1611	      position_independent=True,
1612	    )
1613	
1614	    # ═══ SYNC A (entry): 256-thread cross-WG barrier ═══
1615	    # After this, sA mainloop is done; safe to overwrite sEpi (= sA union slot).
1616	    # fence_view_async_shared ensures all prior async-shared writes (pipeline_A
1617	    # consumer releases) are globally visible before sEpi STSM.
1618	    cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1619	    cute.arch.barrier(
1620	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.Epilogue),
1621	      number_of_threads=self.num_mma_threads,
1622	    )
1623	
1624	    # WG1 R2S: acc_dV (fp32) → sEpi (fp16) via STSM.
1625	    copy_dV_r2s(acc_dV, dst_idx=None)
1626	    cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1627	
1628	    # WG1-internal 128-thread fence (reuse WarpSchedulerWG2 id=3 for this).
1629	    cute.arch.barrier(
1630	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.WarpSchedulerWG2),
1631	      number_of_threads=self.num_threads_per_warp_group,
1632	    )
1633	    if warp_idx == 4:
1634	      store_dV()
1635	      cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_commit_group()
1636	      cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_wait_group(0, read=True)
1637	
1638	    # ═══ SYNC B (WG1 dV TMA done): WG2 may now overwrite sEpi for dK ═══
1639	    cute.arch.barrier(
1640	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.Epilogue),
1641	      number_of_threads=self.num_mma_threads,
1642	    )
1643	
1644	    # ═══ SYNC C (WG2 dK done): WG1 waits for WG2 to finish before exiting ═══
1645	    cute.arch.barrier(
1646	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.Epilogue),
1647	      number_of_threads=self.num_mma_threads,
1648	    )
1649	
1650	  @cute.jit
1651	  def epilogue_dK_slice(
1652	    self,
1653	    acc_dK: cute.Tensor,
1654	    mdK: cute.Tensor,
1655	    sEpi: cute.Tensor,
1656	    seqlen: SeqlenInfoQK,
1657	    tma_atom_dK: cute.CopyAtom,
1658	    tiled_mma_dK: cute.TiledMma,
1659	    tidx: Int32,  # WG-local ∈ [0, 128)
1660	    n_block: Int32,
1661	    head_idx: Int32,
1662	    batch_idx: Int32,
1663	    d_pass: Int32,
1664	  ):
1665	    """Called by WG2 only. Writes dK[:, d_pass*d_chunk:(d_pass+1)*d_chunk]."""
1666	    warp_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx())
1667	    # WG2 occupies warp 8..11 (CTA-absolute). warp_idx == 8 issues TMA store.
1668	
1669	    mdK_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_K(
1670	      mdK, batch_idx, dim=3, ragged=self.varlen_k
1671	    )[None, None, head_idx]
1672	    gdK = cute.local_tile(
1673	      mdK_cur, (self.tile_n, self.d_chunk), (n_block, d_pass)
1674	    )
1675	    store_dK, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
1676	      tma_atom_dK, 0, cute.make_layout(1), sEpi, gdK, single_stage=True
1677	    )
1678	    copy_dK_r2s, _, _ = copy_utils.get_smem_store_C(
1679	      tiled_mma_dK,
1680	      sEpi,
1681	      tidx,
1682	      transpose=False,
1683	      position_independent=True,
1684	    )
1685	
1686	    # ═══ SYNC A (entry): symmetric with WG1 ═══
1687	    cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1688	    cute.arch.barrier(
1689	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.Epilogue),
1690	      number_of_threads=self.num_mma_threads,
1691	    )
1692	
1693	    # ═══ SYNC B: wait for WG1 dV TMA done (sEpi freed) ═══
1694	    cute.arch.barrier(
1695	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.Epilogue),
1696	      number_of_threads=self.num_mma_threads,
1697	    )
1698	
1699	    # WG2 R2S: acc_dK (fp32) → sEpi (fp16).
1700	    copy_dK_r2s(acc_dK, dst_idx=None)
1701	    cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1702	
1703	    # WG2-internal 128-thread fence (reuse WarpSchedulerWG3 id=4).
1704	    cute.arch.barrier(
1705	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.WarpSchedulerWG3),
1706	      number_of_threads=self.num_threads_per_warp_group,
1707	    )
1708	    if warp_idx == 8:
1709	      store_dK()
1710	      cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_commit_group()
1711	      cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_wait_group(0, read=True)
1712	
1713	    # ═══ SYNC C: signal WG1 that WG2's dK TMA is complete ═══
1714	    cute.arch.barrier(
1715	      barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierBwd.Epilogue),
1716	      number_of_threads=self.num_mma_threads,
1717	    )
1718
